eligibility_rules.description: MSMEs in Gujarat involved in or aspiring to export textiles, apparel, handloom, or handicraft products.

schemes.application_mode: Through membership or registration with the council

schemes.name: Marketing Support & Services (MSS) Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Handicraft artisans and producers
schemes.description: A component of the National Handicraft Development Programme (NHDP) that provides financial support for marketing and promotional activities to enhance the visibility and sales of handicraft products.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for participating in domestic and international marketing events, exhibitions, and design competitions. Support for leveraging e-commerce platforms.
required_docs: Application for a specific event or exhibition

eligibility_rules.description: Handicraft artisans registered under the NHDP seeking to participate in approved marketing events.

schemes.application_mode: Submission of proposals for specific marketing events through the NHDP portal

schemes.name: Skill Development for Handicraft Sector (SDHS)
schemes.target_audience: Handicraft artisans
schemes.description: A scheme under the National Handicraft Development Programme (NHDP) focused on providing training and skill upgradation to artisans in the handicraft sector.
schemes.benefits: Access to skill development programs, training workshops, and modern production techniques to improve product quality and marketability.
required_docs: Proof of prior experience in handicrafts

eligibility_rules.description: Artisans in the handicraft sector seeking to upgrade their skills.

schemes.application_mode: Submission of project proposals through the NHDP portal

schemes.name: Pudhumai Penn Scheme (Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme)
schemes.target_audience: Girl students from Tamil Nadu who studied from Classes 6 to 12 in Government schools
schemes.description: A scheme to enhance the enrolment ratio of girls from Government schools in Higher Education Institutions by providing monthly financial assistance.
schemes.benefits: Rs. 1,000 per month directly into the student's bank account until the completion of their undergraduate degree, diploma, or ITI course.
required_docs: Proof of study in Government school (Classes 6-12)
Admission proof for higher education course

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a girl student who studied from Classes 6 to 12 in Government schools in Tamil Nadu and is pursuing a recognized higher education course (UG degree, diploma, ITI).

schemes.application_mode: Through Institute

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Post-Matric Scholarship for SC
schemes.target_audience: Students belonging to the Scheduled Caste (SC) community in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: Post-matric scholarship provided by the Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare department for SC students pursuing higher education.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for educational expenses, amount varies.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a resident of Tamil Nadu from the SC community. Annual family income must be less than ₹2.5 Lakhs. Must have passed the previous exam with at least 50% marks.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Post-Matric Scholarship for ST
schemes.target_audience: Students belonging to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) community in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: Post-matric scholarship provided by the Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare department for ST students pursuing higher education.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for educational expenses, amount varies.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a resident of Tamil Nadu from the ST community. Annual family income must be less than ₹2.5 Lakhs. Must have passed the previous exam with at least 50% marks.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu BC Post-Matric Scholarship
schemes.target_audience: Students belonging to the Backward Classes (BC) community in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: Post-matric scholarship provided by the BC Welfare Department for BC students pursuing studies from Class 11 onwards.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for educational expenses, amount varies.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must belong to the BC community in Tamil Nadu with an annual family income of less than ₹2.5 Lakhs.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu MBC Post-Matric Scholarship
schemes.target_audience: Students belonging to the Most Backward Classes (MBC) community in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: Post-matric scholarship provided by the BC Welfare Department for MBC students pursuing studies from Class 11 onwards.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for educational expenses, amount varies.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must belong to the MBC community in Tamil Nadu with an annual family income of less than ₹2.5 Lakhs.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu DNC Post-Matric Scholarship
schemes.target_audience: Students belonging to the Denotified Communities (DNC) in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: Post-matric scholarship provided by the BC Welfare Department for DNC students pursuing studies from Class 11 onwards.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for educational expenses, amount varies.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must belong to the DNC community in Tamil Nadu with an annual family income of less than ₹2.5 Lakhs.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Startup Seed Grant Fund (TNSSGF)
schemes.target_audience: Early-stage startups, innovators, students, and faculty requiring Idea-to-PoC funding.
schemes.description: A fund of Rs. 50 Crore managed by TANSIM to provide grants for early-stage financing, research, innovation, and prototyping, filling the gap for pre-startup activities.
schemes.benefits: Provides grants up to a maximum of Rs. 50 lakh to support the journey from Idea-to-Proof of Concept (PoC) and other early-stage financing needs.
required_docs: Detailed project report or business plan

eligibility_rules.description: Innovative ideas from students, faculty, or individuals selected by the Scientific Startup Seed Fund Board. Supports pre-startup activities like prototyping and testing.

schemes.application_mode: Tamil Nadu Startup Portal (managed by TANSIM)

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Startup Fund of Funds
schemes.target_audience: Startups and MSMEs in Tamil Nadu seeking venture capital.
schemes.description: A Rs. 250 crore fund registered as an Alternative Investment Fund (AIF) under SEBI regulations. It invests in other SEBI-registered AIFs, which in turn fund startups and MSMEs in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.benefits: Facilitates access to larger pools of venture capital for startups and MSMEs by investing through a network of professional fund managers.
required_docs: Detailed business plan and financial projections

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a startup or MSME established and operating in Tamil Nadu. Funding is routed through SEBI-registered AIFs.

schemes.application_mode: Through SEBI registered Alternative Investment Funds (AIFs) in which the Fund of Funds has invested.

schemes.name: TANSIM Marketing and R&D Support
schemes.target_audience: Startups in Tamil Nadu requiring non-fiscal support.
schemes.description: A program by the Tamil Nadu Startup and Innovation Mission (TANSIM) to assist startups with market access, research and development activities, and tapping into research grants.
schemes.benefits: Provides facilitation for marketing, R&D, and assistance in applying for research grants from national bodies like DST, CSIR, etc.
required_docs: Proposal outlining marketing or R&D needs

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a startup registered with and recognized by TANSIM.

schemes.application_mode: Tamil Nadu Startup Portal (TANSIM)

schemes.name: Special Seed Fund for Persons with Disabilities and Transgender Individuals
schemes.target_audience: Startups founded or led by persons with disabilities and transgender individuals.
schemes.description: A dedicated seed fund launched by the Tamil Nadu government to promote inclusive entrepreneurship and provide financial support to startups from marginalized communities.
schemes.benefits: Provides seed funding and financial support to help ventures launch, operate, and thrive.
required_docs: Disability certificate or Transgender identity certificate for the founder(s)

eligibility_rules.description: The startup must be led by persons with disabilities or transgender individuals.

schemes.application_mode: StartupTN Portal

schemes.name: Gramam Thorum Puthozhil (Establishing Start-ups in Villages)
schemes.target_audience: Entrepreneurs and innovators in rural areas of Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A scheme focused on fostering inclusive entrepreneurship, promoting rural innovation, and driving sustainable economic growth by establishing startups in villages.
schemes.benefits: Provides local village innovation pilot funds (up to ₹1 lakh) and larger support for special categories, along with market access and a regional startup push.
required_docs: Proof of residence in a rural area

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a startup or innovator based in a village in Tamil Nadu, meeting local innovation criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Tamil Nadu Startup Portal

schemes.name: StartupTN VC Partner Network Funding
schemes.target_audience: Growth-stage startups in Tamil Nadu seeking venture capital.
schemes.description: An initiative by StartupTN to connect startups with its partner network of over 200 Venture Capital (VC) firms to facilitate funding.
schemes.benefits: Direct access and networking opportunities with a large pool of VC firms to raise significant capital for scaling operations.

eligibility_rules.description: Startups registered in Tamil Nadu that are ready for venture capital investment.

schemes.application_mode: Through StartupTN platforms and events like the Tamil Nadu Global Startup Summit.

schemes.name: Agri-Tech Grant Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Agri-Tech startups in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: Offers financial support to Agri-Tech startups in Tamil Nadu, enabling both early development and market expansion. The program focuses on solutions across crop, livestock, and fisheries.
schemes.benefits: Financial grant of ₹10 lakh to ₹25 lakh based on the startup’s stage and growth needs.
required_docs: Financial statements for the past three years

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a DPIIT-recognized startup headquartered in Tamil Nadu, registered as a Private Limited Company, LLP, or Partnership, with an average profit under ₹5 lakh in the past three years. The startup must be working on innovation or improvement in agricultural products or processes.

schemes.application_mode: Online via StartupTN portal

schemes.name: Sub-Mission On Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM)
schemes.target_audience: Individual farmers, farmer groups, and entrepreneurs establishing Custom Hiring Centres (CHCs).
schemes.description: A central scheme providing financial support for the acquisition of farm machinery to boost mechanization. It also supports the establishment of Custom Hiring Centres (CHCs), Farm Machinery Banks (FMBs), and Hi-Tech hubs for advanced equipment.
schemes.benefits: Financial subsidy on a wide range of agricultural machinery like tractors, power tillers, and harvesters. Supports renting equipment through CHCs.

eligibility_rules.description: Benefits are available to all categories of farmers and entities involved in agricultural mechanization across India.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the central SMAM digital portal (agrimachinery.nic.in) or respective state agriculture department portals.

schemes.name: Namo Drone Didi Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Women Self-Help Groups (SHGs)
schemes.description: A central scheme to provide agricultural drones to women's self-help groups. These SHGs can then rent out the drones to farmers for agricultural purposes like spraying fertilizers and pesticides.
schemes.benefits: Subsidy of up to 80% of the cost of an agricultural drone. Empowers women SHGs and provides farmers with access to modern technology.
required_docs: Drone pilot training certificate for the operator

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered Women Self-Help Group.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal or through designated government agencies.

schemes.name: Sugarcane Farmers Incentive Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Sugarcane farmers in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A state-level incentive provided to sugarcane farmers over and above the central government's Fair and Remunerative Price (FRP) to support their income.
schemes.benefits: An incentive of ₹349 per metric ton (MT) of sugarcane, bringing the total price to ₹3,500 per MT.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered sugarcane farmer in Tamil Nadu supplying to sugar mills.

schemes.application_mode: Automatically applied through sugar mills during procurement.

schemes.name: Chief Minister’s Mannuyir Kaathu Mannuyir Kaapom Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A comprehensive scheme aimed at soil protection and sustainable agriculture, with an allocation of ₹142 crore for 15 key components.
schemes.benefits: Support for various agricultural practices and inputs aimed at improving soil health and sustainability. Specific benefits depend on the 15 components of the scheme.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to all farmers in Tamil Nadu, with specific eligibility varying by the component applied for.

schemes.application_mode: Through local agriculture department offices.

schemes.name: Hill Farmer Development Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Farmers residing and cultivating in the hilly regions of Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A targeted scheme with a ₹22 crore allocation to provide financial assistance and support to approximately 63,000 farmers in hilly areas.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance and other support tailored to the unique challenges of hill agriculture.
required_docs: Proof of residence in a designated hill area
Land ownership documents for hill cultivation

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a farmer cultivating land in the designated hilly regions of Tamil Nadu.

schemes.application_mode: Through the state's horticulture or agriculture department offices in hill districts.

schemes.name: Bharat-VISTAAR (Virtually Integrated System to Access Agricultural Resources)
schemes.target_audience: All farmers across India
schemes.description: A multilingual AI-driven tool proposed in the Union Budget 2026-27. It will integrate AgriStack portals and ICAR data to provide customized advisory support to farmers, helping them make better decisions and reduce risks.
schemes.benefits: Access to personalized, real-time agricultural advice on crop management, weather, and market prices, aiming to increase farm productivity.

eligibility_rules.description: Accessible to any farmer with a smartphone or access to a digital service center.

schemes.application_mode: Digital platform / Mobile application.

schemes.name: NABARD Agritech and Climate Startup Funds
schemes.target_audience: Agritech and climate-focused startups in India.
schemes.description: NABARD is launching two dedicated funds in 2026: the ₹1,000 crore Green Impact Fund and the ₹300 crore Carbon Fund. These funds aim to finance early-stage innovation in sustainable farming, climate resilience, and emissions reduction.
schemes.benefits: Venture funding and financial support for startups working on innovative solutions for agriculture and climate change.

eligibility_rules.description: Early-stage agritech and climate-focused startups working on innovation that serves farmers and promotes sustainability.

schemes.application_mode: Through NABARD's venture capital arms or designated application portals.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Women Employment and Safety (TNWESafe) Project
schemes.target_audience: Women across Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A comprehensive ₹5,000-crore, five-year initiative launched in 2026, backed by the World Bank. It integrates employment generation, workplace safety, care infrastructure, and health support to tackle barriers to women's workforce participation.
schemes.benefits: Provides improved employment opportunities, enhanced workplace safety, access to care facilities like homes and hostels, and integrated health support to foster economic independence.

eligibility_rules.description: Aimed at all educated women in Tamil Nadu seeking to live independently, earn respectable salaries, become entrepreneurs, and live without fear.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the Naan Mudhalvan portal and designated government offices.

schemes.name: Dr Muthulakshmi Reddy Maternity Benefit Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Pregnant women and new mothers
schemes.description: A maternal health scheme providing financial assistance and nutrition kits to encourage institutional deliveries and ensure safer pre-natal and post-natal care.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹18,000 and provision of comprehensive nutrition kits.
required_docs: Proof of Pregnancy from a government health facility

eligibility_rules.description: Eligible for pregnant women in Tamil Nadu for their first two live births.

schemes.application_mode: Registration at local Primary Health Centres (PHCs) or Anganwadi centers.

schemes.name: Makkal Thedi Maruthuvam
schemes.target_audience: General population, with a focus on women and individuals with non-communicable diseases (NCDs).
schemes.description: A decentralized healthcare program where trained women health volunteers visit households to provide health services directly at the doorstep, including screening for NCDs, medicine delivery, and palliative support.
schemes.benefits: Doorstep delivery of medicines for chronic illnesses, screening for NCDs like hypertension and diabetes, palliative care, and integrated breast and cervical cancer screening.

eligibility_rules.description: All residents of Tamil Nadu are eligible. Services are delivered proactively by health volunteers at the household level.

schemes.application_mode: No formal application required; enrollment is done by local health workers during household visits.

schemes.name: Chief Minister’s Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Low and middle-income families in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A health insurance scheme providing financial protection against high medical expenses. It offers cashless treatment for specified ailments at a network of empanelled government and private hospitals.
schemes.benefits: Provides cashless treatment coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year.

eligibility_rules.description: Families residing in Tamil Nadu with an annual income below a specified threshold.

schemes.application_mode: Enrollment through designated district kiosks and government offices.

schemes.name: Free Cervical Cancer (HPV) Vaccination Programme
schemes.target_audience: Adolescent girls and young women
schemes.description: A key public health measure aimed at preventing cervical cancer by providing free Human Papillomavirus (HPV) vaccinations to the target age group.
schemes.benefits: Free HPV vaccination to protect against cervical cancer.

eligibility_rules.description: Targeted at a specific age group of girls and young women to maximize effectiveness against HPV infection.

schemes.application_mode: Administered through government schools and Primary Health Centres (PHCs).

schemes.name: Innuyir Kappom Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Accident victims in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: An emergency care scheme that guarantees free medical treatment for trauma care for the first 48 hours after an accident at empanelled hospitals.
schemes.benefits: Free and cashless trauma care for the first 48 hours after an accident, covering all essential medical procedures.
required_docs: No documents required for immediate admission and treatment.

eligibility_rules.description: Any individual who has been in a road accident within the geographical limits of Tamil Nadu is eligible, regardless of their state of residence.

schemes.application_mode: Automatic eligibility upon admission to an empanelled hospital following an accident.

schemes.name: Naan Mudhalvan Scheme for Engineering Students
schemes.target_audience: Engineering students in Tamil Nadu colleges
schemes.description: A component of Tamil Nadu's flagship 'Naan Mudhalvan' scheme, specifically designed to provide trending and employment-oriented skill courses to engineering students, aligning academic learning with evolving industry requirements.
schemes.benefits: Provides free access to over 60 specialized, industry-aligned skill courses. Each course runs for 45 to 60 hours per semester and includes industry-recognized certifications. The program is fully funded by the state government.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a student currently enrolled in an Engineering program in a college within Tamil Nadu. The general age criteria for the scheme is 18 to 35 years.

schemes.application_mode: Through affiliated colleges and institutions

schemes.name: Naan Mudhalvan Scheme for Arts and Science Students
schemes.target_audience: Arts and Science college students in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: This scheme, under the 'Naan Mudhalvan' initiative, aims to boost the employability of Arts and Science students by offering skill development courses that are aligned with current industry demands.
schemes.benefits: Offers 38 free, employment-oriented skill courses. Training is conducted offline for 45-60 hours per semester and leads to industry-recognized certifications. The program also includes faculty development.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a student enrolled in an Arts and Science college in Tamil Nadu. The general age criteria for the scheme is 18 to 35 years.

schemes.application_mode: Through affiliated colleges and institutions

schemes.name: Naan Mudhalvan Scheme for Polytechnic Students
schemes.target_audience: Students of Polytechnic institutions in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A dedicated track of the 'Naan Mudhalvan' scheme focused on providing practical, job-ready skill training to students enrolled in polytechnic institutions across the state.
schemes.benefits: Provides access to 43 specialized skill development programs free of cost. Training is delivered in-person by industry partners and includes industry-recognized certification.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a student currently enrolled in a Polytechnic institution in Tamil Nadu. The general age criteria for the scheme is 18 to 35 years.

schemes.application_mode: Through affiliated polytechnic institutions

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Vetri Nichayam Scheme 2026
schemes.target_audience: Unemployed youth of Tamil Nadu, including graduates, ITI/diploma holders, and school dropouts.
schemes.description: Also known as the 'Scheme of Assured Success', this is a holistic skill training initiative to equip unemployed youth with industry-relevant skills, thereby closing the gap between education and employment. The government also facilitates job placements.
schemes.benefits: Provides free, high-quality skill development training for approximately 100 hours across hundreds of different courses. The scheme also offers assistance with job placements, internships, and apprenticeships through its network of industry partners.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an unemployed youth residing in Tamil Nadu.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Tamil Nadu Skill Development Corporation (TNSDC) official website.

schemes.name: TAHDCO Multiple Skill Training and Placement Program
schemes.target_audience: Adi Dravidar and tribal youth in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A special program by the Tamil Nadu Adi Dravidar Housing and Development Corporation (TAHDCO) to provide dedicated skill and employment training to empower youth from Adi Dravidar and tribal communities.
schemes.benefits: Offers specialized skill development training and placement assistance to improve employment outcomes for youth from specified communities.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must belong to the Adi Dravidar or tribal community in Tamil Nadu.

schemes.application_mode: Through TAHDCO district offices or its official portal.

schemes.name: Free Online Skill Training for Children of Construction Workers
schemes.target_audience: Children of construction workers in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: An initiative implemented by the Tamil Nadu Academy of Construction (TAC) under the state Labour Department to provide free online skill training to 50,000 children of registered construction workers.
schemes.benefits: Provides free online skill training to enhance the skills and employability of the children of construction workers.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a child of a construction worker registered with the state's welfare board.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Kalaignar Kanavu Illam Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Poor and homeless households in rural areas of Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A state-funded housing scheme aiming to construct 100,000 new houses by 2026 for the rural poor. The scheme provides houses with basic amenities like drinking water, electricity, and sanitation facilities, aiming for rural upliftment.
schemes.benefits: Provides a debt-free, reinforced concrete house with integrated sanitation, drinking water, and electricity connections.

eligibility_rules.description: Beneficiaries are selected from poor and homeless rural households based on official socio-economic criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Through local government bodies such as Village Panchayats and District Administrations.

schemes.name: Mudalvarin Grama Saalaigal Membattu Thittam (MGSMT)
schemes.target_audience: Residents of rural areas in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A rural road development scheme aimed at improving connectivity in villages. The government plans to construct 2,200 km of new roads at a cost of ₹10,088 crore under this initiative.
schemes.benefits: Construction and upgradation of rural roads, leading to improved transportation and access to services for village residents.

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme is implemented on an area-basis to develop infrastructure in rural parts of the state.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the state government's rural development department.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Urban Greening Policy 2026
schemes.target_audience: Urban Local Bodies, industries, and residents of cities and towns in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A policy framework to integrate trees, urban forests, parks, and blue-green infrastructure into urban planning. It aims to build climate-resilient, liveable, and sustainable cities.
schemes.benefits: Increased green cover in urban areas, improved air quality, climate change mitigation, and enhanced biodiversity.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to all urban areas across Tamil Nadu. Funding is mobilized through convergence of existing schemes like AMRUT and Smart Cities Mission.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by state government departments and Urban Local Bodies.

schemes.name: Green Tamil Nadu Mission
schemes.target_audience: General public, farmers, industries, and educational institutions in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A statewide mission to increase the forest and tree cover to 33%. Activities include mass seedling plantation, promoting agroforestry, mangrove restoration, and creating micro forests.
schemes.benefits: Enhancement of ecological security, climate change resilience, and sustainable livelihoods through greening activities.
required_docs: Varies based on the specific activity, such as land ownership documents for agroforestry.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to all individuals and institutions willing to participate in tree planting and greening initiatives across the state.

schemes.application_mode: Through the Tamil Nadu Forest Department and local government bodies.

schemes.name: Ungaludan Stalin Pension Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Eligible citizens requiring social security, such as the elderly, widows, or persons with disabilities.
schemes.description: A monthly pension scheme providing financial assistance to beneficiaries. The text mentions that 33.6 lakh persons have already benefited from this scheme.
schemes.benefits: Regular monthly financial assistance (pension).

eligibility_rules.description: Specific eligibility criteria regarding age, income, and social status apply, as defined by the state government.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state's social welfare portal or offline through designated government offices.

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission – Urban (Tamil Nadu)
schemes.target_audience: Urban households without toilets, and Urban Local Bodies (ULBs).
schemes.description: The urban component of the national Swachh Bharat Mission, implemented in Tamil Nadu to eliminate open defecation, manage solid waste, and promote sanitation in cities and towns.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for the construction of individual household latrines (IHHL) and community toilets. Support for solid waste management infrastructure.
required_docs: Proof of Residence in an urban area

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a resident of an urban area in Tamil Nadu and should not have an existing toilet facility at home.

schemes.application_mode: Through the respective Urban Local Body (Municipality/Corporation).

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Assured Pension Scheme (TAPS)
schemes.target_audience: State government employees in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A pension scheme for Tamil Nadu State government employees, providing an assured pension equivalent to benefits under the Old Pension Scheme (OPS).
schemes.benefits: Assured pension equal to 50% of the last-drawn basic pay.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a Tamil Nadu State government employee.

schemes.application_mode: Through respective government departments

schemes.name: Pension Scheme for Unorganised Workers (e-Shram)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganised workers like street vendors, agricultural labourers, construction workers, etc.
schemes.description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganized sector workers, with a matching contribution from the Central Government, accessible via the e-Shram portal.
schemes.benefits: Assured monthly pension after attaining the age of 60. The scheme involves a 50% monthly contribution from the beneficiary and an equal matching contribution from the Central Government.
required_docs: Savings Bank Account or Jan Dhan account details

eligibility_rules.description: Unorganised workers not members of EPFO/ESIC/NPS.

schemes.application_mode: Online via e-Shram portal or Common Service Centres (CSC)

schemes.name: Pension Scheme for Shopkeepers and Self-Employed Persons
schemes.target_audience: Small shopkeepers, restaurant owners, hotel owners, real estate brokers.
schemes.description: A pension scheme for small retail traders, shopkeepers, and self-employed persons with an annual turnover not exceeding Rs. 1.5 Crore.
schemes.benefits: Beneficiaries are entitled to receive a monthly assured pension of Rs. 3000 after attaining the age of 60 years.

eligibility_rules.description: Shopkeepers or self-employed individuals aged 18-40, not covered under EPFO/ESIC/PM-SYM, with an annual turnover not exceeding Rs. 1.5 Crore.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal and Common Service Centres (CSC)

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.target_audience: Indian citizens with a bank account
schemes.description: A government-backed life insurance scheme offering a renewable one-year term life cover.
schemes.benefits: Provides a life cover of Rs. 2 lakh in case of death due to any cause, for an annual premium of Rs. 436.
required_docs: Bank account details (Jan Dhan or savings)

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an Indian citizen in the age group of 18 to 50 years with a savings bank account.

schemes.application_mode: Through participating banks and post offices

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
schemes.target_audience: Indian citizens with a bank account
schemes.description: A government-backed accident insurance scheme offering cover for death or disability due to an accident.
schemes.benefits: Provides insurance cover for accidental death and disability.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an Indian citizen with a savings bank account.

schemes.application_mode: Through participating banks and post offices

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Women Employment and Safety Project (TNWESafe)
schemes.target_audience: Women in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A comprehensive state-led, World Bank-backed project to address women’s employment, safety, and economic participation through integrated interventions.
schemes.benefits: Promotes sustainable and inclusive economic development for women by improving job opportunities, workplace safety, care infrastructure, and health support.
required_docs: Proof of residence in Tamil Nadu

eligibility_rules.description: Women residing in the state of Tamil Nadu.

schemes.application_mode: To be announced by the state government

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu EV Motor Vehicle Tax Exemption
schemes.target_audience: Buyers of new electric vehicles (private and commercial)
schemes.description: A policy providing a 100% exemption on motor vehicle tax for all new electric vehicles to reduce the total cost of ownership and promote EV adoption, valid until 2027.
schemes.benefits: 100% exemption on motor vehicle tax and waiver of registration fees for all new battery-operated vehicles including two-wheelers, private cars, auto-rickshaws, taxis, light goods carriers, and buses.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to all new electric vehicles purchased and registered within Tamil Nadu before the policy expiration in 2027.

schemes.application_mode: Applied automatically at the time of vehicle registration at the Regional Transport Office (RTO).

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Solar Rooftop Subsidy
schemes.target_audience: Residential consumers
schemes.description: A state-level subsidy for residential consumers installing grid-connected rooftop solar systems, aimed at promoting clean energy generation at the household level.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹30,000 per kW for the first 3 kW of installed capacity, resulting in a maximum subsidy of ₹90,000 for a 3 kW or larger system.

eligibility_rules.description: Available for individual residential households installing new grid-connected rooftop solar systems on their premises.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the national solar rooftop portal (PM Surya Ghar Yojana).

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu EV Manufacturing Incentives Policy
schemes.target_audience: EV manufacturers, component makers, and battery recycling units
schemes.description: A comprehensive set of supply-side incentives to attract investment in the electric vehicle manufacturing ecosystem, including capital subsidies, tax exemptions, and employment incentives.
schemes.benefits: Includes a 15% capital subsidy on eligible investments until 31st Dec 2025, 100% electricity tax and stamp duty exemption, a 1% turnover-based subsidy, and an EPF contribution subsidy of ₹48,000 per new employee for one year.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to new and expanding units in the EV manufacturing sector. Specific criteria apply for certain benefits, such as a minimum turnover of INR 50 crore for the turnover-based subsidy.

schemes.application_mode: Application through the state's industrial development portal.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Captive Renewable Energy Plant Incentive
schemes.target_audience: Industrial and commercial entities
schemes.description: An incentive scheme for businesses setting up their own renewable energy plants, such as windmills or solar farms, for self-consumption.
schemes.benefits: Up to 20% of the expenses for setting up a captive renewable energy plant are eligible for incentives.

eligibility_rules.description: The entity must use over 50% of the generated energy for its own in-house consumption to be eligible for the incentive.

schemes.application_mode: Online application through the state energy department portal.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Windmill Repowering Policy
schemes.target_audience: Owners of old windmills
schemes.description: A policy framework that mandates or facilitates the repowering, refurbishment, or life extension of aging windmills to enhance their efficiency and energy output.
schemes.benefits: Provides a structured pathway for windmill owners to upgrade their assets, potentially increasing generation capacity and revenue. May include streamlined approvals or other non-financial benefits.
required_docs: Application to the State Nodal Agency (TEDA)

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to wind energy generators commissioned before April 1, 2016, upon completion of 20 years of operational life.

schemes.application_mode: Application to the Tamil Nadu Energy Development Agency (TEDA).

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu ICE to EV Retrofitting Incentive
schemes.target_audience: Owners of commercial Internal Combustion Engine (ICE) vehicles
schemes.description: A scheme offering financial incentives to encourage the conversion of existing petrol or diesel commercial vehicles into electric vehicles.
schemes.benefits: Financial subsidy for retrofitting commercial vehicles from ICE to EV. The exact incentive amount is subject to government notification.
required_docs: ARAI Approval Certificate for the kit

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable for commercial vehicles retrofitted to EV using ARAI-approved kits. The scheme is valid until December 31, 2025.

schemes.application_mode: Application through the State Transport Department portal.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Renewable Energy Land Portal and Rooftop Solar Explorer
schemes.target_audience: Renewable energy project developers and investors
schemes.description: An online platform designed to streamline the process of identifying and accessing suitable land for setting up renewable energy projects, simplifying procedures and reducing delays.
schemes.benefits: Simplifies and accelerates the process of land acquisition for renewable energy projects, helping to speed up project implementation.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to any individual or company intending to invest in and develop renewable energy projects within Tamil Nadu.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the dedicated portal.

schemes.name: Marriage Assistance for Differently Abled Persons
schemes.target_audience: Persons with disabilities in Tamil Nadu who are getting married.
schemes.description: A scheme providing a one-time financial grant to support disabled individuals upon their marriage, promoting their right to a dignified social life.
schemes.benefits: Provides a one-time financial assistance amount (e.g., ₹30,000) to eligible differently abled persons upon their marriage.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a resident of Tamil Nadu and possess a valid disability certificate of 40% or more.

schemes.application_mode: Application through the District Differently Abled Welfare Office (DDAWO).

schemes.name: Maintenance Allowance for Persons with Severe Disabilities
schemes.target_audience: Individuals with severe or multiple disabilities (typically 80% or above) belonging to BPL households.
schemes.description: Provides a monthly maintenance grant to individuals with severe disabilities to help them with their daily needs and improve their quality of life.
schemes.benefits: A monthly maintenance grant (e.g., ₹1,500) is provided to the beneficiary.
required_docs: Disability Certificate indicating 80% or more disability

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a person with a severe or multiple disability (80% or above), belong to a Below Poverty Line (BPL) household, and be between 18 to 79 years of age.

schemes.application_mode: Application through the District Differently Abled Welfare Office (DDAWO).

schemes.name: Educational Scholarship for Differently Abled Students
schemes.target_audience: Students with disabilities pursuing education in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: An annual scholarship program designed to ensure the continuity of education for disabled students by providing financial support.
schemes.benefits: Annual scholarship ranging from ₹3,000 to ₹8,000 or more, depending on the level of education.
required_docs: Proof of admission in an educational institution

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a student with a disability enrolled in a recognized educational institution in Tamil Nadu.

schemes.application_mode: Online application via the state scholarship portal or through the educational institution.

schemes.name: ADIP Scheme - Assistance for Purchase/Fitting of Aids/Appliances
schemes.target_audience: Needy persons with disabilities across India, including Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A central government scheme to assist needy persons with disabilities in procuring durable, modern, and scientifically manufactured aids and appliances to promote their physical, social, and psychological rehabilitation.
schemes.benefits: Provides assistive devices such as wheelchairs, callipers, walking aids, hearing aids, visual aids, prosthetics, and mobility supports. It also covers the cost of corrective surgeries when required.

eligibility_rules.description: Indian citizen with at least 40% disability, with specific income thresholds. Must not have received similar assistance in recent years.

schemes.application_mode: Through implementing agencies such as ALIMCO, National Institutes, NGOs, and District Disability Rehabilitation Centres (DDRCs).

schemes.name: NDFDC - Divyangjan Swavalamban Yojana (DSY)
schemes.target_audience: Persons with disabilities seeking financial support for self-employment.
schemes.description: A loan scheme by the National Divyangjan Finance and Development Corporation (NDFDC) to promote economic empowerment of PwDs by providing concessional loans for self-employment and income-generating activities.
schemes.benefits: Concessional loans are provided to individual persons with disabilities to start or expand their own business or income-generating activities.
required_docs: Project Report for the proposed business
Quotations for assets to be purchased

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a person with 40% or more disability and meet the age and income criteria set by NDFDC.

schemes.application_mode: Applications are processed through State Channelising Agencies (SCAs) and partner banks.

schemes.name: Travel Concession for Differently Abled Persons
schemes.target_audience: Persons with disabilities holding a valid disability certificate in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A scheme to improve mobility and access for PwDs by offering free or subsidised travel on public transport.
schemes.benefits: Provides free or concessional travel passes for use on state-run public transport buses.
required_docs: National Identity Card for Differently Abled Persons

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a resident of Tamil Nadu and possess a valid disability certificate as per government norms.

schemes.application_mode: Application at the local District Differently Abled Welfare Office (DDAWO) or designated transport corporation offices.

schemes.name: Self Employment and Skill Training for Differently Abled
schemes.target_audience: Differently abled individuals in Tamil Nadu seeking vocational skills for employment.
schemes.description: Provides specialized skill training in various trades to enhance the employability and self-employment opportunities for differently abled persons.
schemes.benefits: Free training in fields such as multimedia, photography, editing, fitter training (for speech and hearing impaired), and bookbinding (for visually impaired).

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a differently abled person and a resident of Tamil Nadu, meeting the specific criteria for the chosen training program.

schemes.application_mode: Online via www.skilltraining.tn.gov.in/DET or in-person at the District Differently Abled Welfare Office (DDAWO).

schemes.name: Animal Husbandry Entrepreneurship Development Programme
schemes.target_audience: Entrepreneurs in the animal husbandry sector in rural and peri-urban areas.
schemes.description: A credit-linked subsidy programme announced in the Union Budget 2026 to support entrepreneurship, scaling up, and modernization of livestock enterprises.
schemes.benefits: Provides credit-linked subsidies to establish or expand livestock enterprises, including dairy and poultry, thereby creating quality employment opportunities.
required_docs: Land ownership documents or lease agreement

eligibility_rules.description: Individuals, Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs), and entrepreneurs looking to start or scale up livestock-related businesses.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the designated central government portal or through local animal husbandry department offices.

schemes.name: Integrated Livestock, Dairy, and Poultry Value Chain Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Livestock farmers, dairy producers, and poultry enterprises.
schemes.description: A government initiative to enhance and modernize the entire value chain for livestock, dairy, and poultry, from production to market.
schemes.benefits: Strengthens supply chains, improves market access, and increases financial returns for producers through better integration and modernization.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers and producer organizations involved in the livestock, dairy, or poultry sectors.

schemes.application_mode: Through Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs) and state animal husbandry departments.

schemes.name: Promotion of Livestock Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs)
schemes.target_audience: Livestock farmers and producers.
schemes.description: A scheme to encourage the formation of Livestock Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs) to improve collective bargaining power and market access.
schemes.benefits: Enhances collective strength, improves market access, provides better price realisation, and boosts overall farmer incomes.
required_docs: Bank account details of the FPO

eligibility_rules.description: Groups of livestock farmers willing to form a collective legal entity (FPO).

schemes.application_mode: Online registration through the National Portal for FPOs or via state agriculture departments.

schemes.name: Integrated Development of Reservoirs and Amrit Sarovars for Fisheries
schemes.target_audience: Fishermen, Fish Farmers Producer Organisations, and fisheries cooperatives.
schemes.description: A Union Budget 2026 proposal for the integrated development of 500 reservoirs and Amrit Sarovars to boost inland fisheries.
schemes.benefits: Development of water bodies for aquaculture and fisheries, leading to increased fish production and livelihood opportunities.
required_docs: Membership details of cooperative or FPO
Details of the proposed water body

eligibility_rules.description: Individuals or groups involved in inland fishing and aquaculture.

schemes.application_mode: Through state fisheries departments and local governing bodies.

schemes.name: Fisheries Value Chain Strengthening Scheme for Coastal Areas
schemes.target_audience: Start-ups, women-led groups, and Fish Farmers Producer Organisations (FFPOs) in coastal regions.
schemes.description: An initiative to strengthen the fisheries value chain in coastal areas by improving market linkages and reducing post-harvest losses.
schemes.benefits: Provides support for market linkages, infrastructure to reduce post-harvest losses, and better price realisation for fish produce.

eligibility_rules.description: Entities operating in the post-harvest fisheries sector in coastal areas, with a focus on start-ups and women's groups.

schemes.application_mode: Proposals to be submitted to the Department of Fisheries at the state or central level.

schemes.name: National Veterinary Services and Disease Prevention Programme
schemes.target_audience: Livestock farmers and veterinary professionals.
schemes.description: A programme focused on improving livestock productivity and health by expanding veterinary services and implementing disease prevention initiatives.
schemes.benefits: Improved access to veterinary care, disease prevention measures to safeguard livestock assets, training for 20,000 veterinarians, and ensuring quality livestock output.

eligibility_rules.description: All livestock farmers are eligible to receive services. Specific criteria may apply for training programmes for veterinarians.

schemes.application_mode: Services are delivered through local government veterinary hospitals and mobile units.

schemes.name: Support for High-Value Agriculture in Coastal Regions
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in coastal regions interested in crop diversification.
schemes.description: A new initiative announced in the 2026 budget to support the cultivation of high-value crops like coconut, cocoa, cashew, and sandalwood in coastal areas.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial and technical support to farmers for diversifying into higher-value farming, thereby increasing income.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers owning agricultural land in designated coastal regions of the state.

schemes.application_mode: Through the state horticulture or agriculture department portals and offices.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Automobile and Auto Component Industry
schemes.target_audience: Automobile and auto component manufacturers, including Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) and suppliers.
schemes.description: A performance-linked incentive scheme with a budgetary outlay of ₹25,938 crore to boost the domestic manufacturing of Advanced Automotive Technology (AAT) products, including battery electric vehicles and hydrogen fuel-cell vehicles. The scheme aims to promote deep localization and create domestic and global supply chains.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives on incremental sales of AAT products manufactured in domestic units. The scheme is applicable for a period of 5 years, from FY 2022-23 to FY 2026-27.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a manufacturer of Advanced Automotive Technology (AAT) products, such as battery electric vehicles, hydrogen fuel-cell vehicles, and related high-technology components.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the PLI AUTO Portal
schemes.state_applicability: Nationwide, with Tamil Nadu being a primary beneficiary state.

schemes.name: Credit-Linked Schemes under the Export Promotion Mission
schemes.target_audience: Exporters across various industries.
schemes.description: Two new credit-linked schemes launched on January 2, 2026, under the Export Promotion Mission. With an outlay of ₹5,181 crore until 2030-31, these schemes are designed to ease and reduce the cost of credit access for exporters.
schemes.benefits: Provides easier and more affordable access to credit, facilitating export activities and boosting international trade.
required_docs: Application for credit from a financial institution

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered exporter with a valid Importer-Exporter Code (IEC).

schemes.application_mode: Through designated financial institutions and banks.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Electronics and Components Manufacturing
schemes.target_audience: Domestic and foreign companies engaged in the manufacturing of electronics and electronic components.
schemes.description: A performance-linked incentive scheme aimed at boosting the manufacturing of electronic components in India to strengthen the electronics ecosystem. The scheme has an approved outlay of ₹22,919 crore.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial incentives on incremental sales of domestically manufactured electronic components, aiming to attract large-scale investments and reduce import dependency.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must be involved in the manufacturing of specified target segments of electronic components.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the relevant government portal.
schemes.state_applicability: Nationwide, with a significant impact on states with established electronics clusters like Tamil Nadu (e.g., Chennai, Sriperumbudur, Hosur).

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for White Goods (ACs and LEDs)
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of air conditioners and LED lights and their components.
schemes.description: A PLI scheme with an outlay of ₹6,238 crore to promote the domestic manufacturing of components for Air Conditioners (ACs) and LED lights. The objective is to increase domestic value addition and make manufacturing in India globally competitive.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives on incremental sales of specified white goods and their components manufactured in India.
required_docs: Project proposal with investment and production targets

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to companies investing in the manufacturing of components for ACs and LEDs, meeting specified investment and production criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the designated government portal.

schemes.name: National Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme Framework
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers across 13 key sectors, including electronics, automobiles, pharmaceuticals, and textiles.
schemes.description: A comprehensive Government of India framework with a total outlay of ₹1.97 lakh crore to boost domestic manufacturing under the 'Make in India' initiative. It provides performance-linked incentives to enhance India's manufacturing capabilities and exports.
schemes.benefits: Incentives on incremental sales from products manufactured in domestic units, attracting investment, creating jobs, and reducing reliance on imports.
required_docs: Varies by specific sector scheme, but generally includes business registration, project reports, and financial statements.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility criteria are defined under the specific PLI schemes for each of the 13 identified sectors.

schemes.application_mode: Online through portals specific to each sector's PLI scheme.
schemes.state_applicability: Nationwide. States with strong industrial ecosystems like Tamil Nadu are major beneficiaries across multiple sectors.

schemes.name: Kalaignarin Kanavu Illam
schemes.target_audience: Economically weaker sections in rural areas of Tamil Nadu.
schemes.description: A housing scheme announced by the Government of Tamil Nadu to provide permanent houses for the rural poor.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for the construction of permanent houses.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a resident of a rural area in Tamil Nadu and not own a permanent house.

schemes.application_mode: Through local Panchayati Raj institutions.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Gramin)
schemes.target_audience: Rural households without pucca (permanent) houses.
schemes.description: A central government scheme, subsuming the Indira Awaas Yojana, to address the housing gap in rural areas and ensure 'Housing for All'.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for the construction of a pucca house with basic amenities.

eligibility_rules.description: Families without housing or living in dilapidated houses as per the Socio-Economic and Caste Census (SECC) 2011 data.

schemes.application_mode: Registration through the Gram Panchayat.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana-III (PMGSY-III)
schemes.target_audience: Rural communities and habitations.
schemes.description: The third phase of the PMGSY focuses on the consolidation of the existing rural road network by upgrading existing Through Routes and Major Rural Links that connect habitations to Gramin Agricultural Markets, Higher Secondary Schools, and Hospitals.
schemes.benefits: Upgraded and well-maintained all-weather rural roads, improving connectivity and access to essential services.

eligibility_rules.description: States must enter a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the central ministry, ensuring allocation of funds for ten years of routine maintenance after construction.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by State Governments through proposals to the Ministry of Rural Development.

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
schemes.target_audience: All rural households.
schemes.description: A central government initiative to ensure Har Ghar Jal (piped water to every household) by providing functional household tap connections to every rural household.
schemes.benefits: Provision of safe and adequate drinking water through individual household tap connections.

eligibility_rules.description: All rural households in the country are eligible to get a functional tap connection.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by state Public Health Engineering Departments or equivalent in coordination with Gram Panchayats.

schemes.name: Digital India Land Records Modernisation Programme (DILRMP)
schemes.target_audience: Landowners in rural and urban areas.
schemes.description: A program to digitize and modernize land records and develop a centralized land record management system.
schemes.benefits: Creates clear and conclusive land titles, reduces property disputes, and provides easier access to land records and financial services.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to all landowners for the purpose of digitizing their property records.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by state revenue or land resources departments.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Circular Economy Investment Policy, 2026
schemes.target_audience: Recycling facilities, technology enablers, and platform entities in the circular economy sector.
schemes.description: A policy by the Tamil Nadu government to promote a circular economy by providing a package of incentives for businesses in the recycling and waste management technology sector.
schemes.benefits: A special package of financial and infrastructural incentives for eligible companies.

eligibility_rules.description: Companies must fulfill specific criteria related to investment, technology, and operations in the circular economy domain as defined by the policy.

schemes.application_mode: Through the relevant state government industrial promotion agency.

schemes.name: Kalaignar Kaivinai Thittam (KKT) Subsidy Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Handicraft and textile artisans in Tamil Nadu
schemes.description: A loan and subsidy scheme by the Government of Tamil Nadu to provide financial assistance to experienced artisans in the state.
schemes.benefits: Provides a loan of up to Rs 3,00,000 to artisans. A subsidy of approximately Rs 50,000 is offered on the total loan amount for eligible applicants.
required_docs: Proof of 5 years experience in the craft

eligibility_rules.description: The applicant must be an artisan residing in Tamil Nadu with a minimum of 5 years of experience. The subsidy option is available for those aged 35 years and above.

schemes.application_mode: Not specified in the provided text

schemes.name: Gen Next Competition
schemes.target_audience: Designers and artisans in the handloom, handicrafts, and textile sectors
schemes.description: A competition launched by the Handlooms, Handicrafts, Textiles, and Khadi Department, Government of Tamil Nadu, to foster new talent and innovation within the textile industry.
schemes.benefits: The specific benefits such as prize money or grants are not detailed in the provided text, but such competitions typically offer recognition, funding, and mentorship.

eligibility_rules.description: Specific eligibility criteria are not mentioned in the provided text.

schemes.application_mode: Not specified in the provided text

schemes.name: Integrated Programme for the Textile Sector
schemes.target_audience: The entire Indian textile value chain, from fibre producers to manufacturers and exporters
schemes.description: A comprehensive programme proposed in the Union Budget 2026-27 to bolster the entire textile value chain, aiming to boost competitiveness, foster self-reliance, and create employment across India.
schemes.benefits: The programme is structured around five sub-components, including the National Fibre Scheme, to strengthen the sector from fibre to fashion and improve global market access.
required_docs: Varies by specific sub-component and nature of application

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility is dependent on the specific sub-component of the programme being applied for.

schemes.application_mode: Not specified in the provided text

schemes.name: National Fibre Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Producers and industries involved with natural fibres (silk, wool, jute), man-made fibres (MMF), and new-age fibres.
schemes.description: A sub-component of the Integrated Programme for the Textile Sector, this scheme aims to achieve self-reliance across the fibre spectrum by supporting the production and development of various textile fibres.
schemes.benefits: Provides support to strengthen the textile value chain from its origin, ensuring a steady and quality supply of raw materials.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility criteria are specific to the type of fibre (natural, man-made) and the nature of the activity (production, processing).

schemes.application_mode: Not specified in the provided text

schemes.name: Corporate Mitras Cadre for MSMEs
schemes.target_audience: Micro, Small and Medium-scale Enterprises (MSMEs) in the textile and apparel sector.
schemes.description: A scheme announced in the Union Budget 2026-27 to develop a 'corporate mitras' cadre to help MSMEs with compliance, financing, and market access.
schemes.benefits: Provides expert assistance to MSMEs, helping them navigate regulatory requirements and connect with financial institutions and markets, thereby boosting their growth.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered Micro, Small, or Medium-scale Enterprise in India.

schemes.application_mode: Not specified in the provided text

schemes.name: UP Pre-Matric Scholarship (Class 9-10)
schemes.target_audience: Students from General, SC, ST, OBC, and Minority categories in Class 9 and 10.
schemes.description: A scholarship provided by the Uttar Pradesh State Government to offer financial assistance to students in classes 9 and 10, enabling them to complete their matriculation.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance, with specific amounts like ₹3,000 annually mentioned for the General category.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a domicile resident of Uttar Pradesh and enrolled in Class 9 or 10 in a recognized school.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the official UP Scholarship portal.

schemes.name: UP Post-Matric Intermediate Scholarship (Class 11-12)
schemes.target_audience: Students studying in Class 11 and 12 in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: Financial aid for students who have passed the high school (Class 10) examination and are enrolled in Class 11 or 12 in a recognized institution.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹1,200 per month to cover academic expenses.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a domicile of Uttar Pradesh and enrolled in Class 11 or 12.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: UP Post-Matric Scholarship (Other than Intermediate)
schemes.target_audience: Students pursuing undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, or certificate courses after Class 12.
schemes.description: A scholarship for UP domicile students enrolled in higher education courses at recognized universities or colleges within Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance to support higher education, with amounts varying based on the course.
required_docs: Proof of Admission to a higher education course

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a domicile of Uttar Pradesh and enrolled in a post-matriculation course (other than Class 11-12) within the state.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: GATE Fellowship for M.Tech Programs
schemes.target_audience: Students admitted to M.Tech programs with a high GATE score.
schemes.description: A fellowship for students admitted to M.Tech programs in the academic session 2025-26 who have a valid and high-percentile GATE score.
schemes.benefits: A fellowship of up to ₹12,400 per month from August 2025 to May 2026.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be admitted to an M.Tech program for the 2025-26 session with a valid GATE score of 75 percentile or above.

schemes.application_mode: Through the admitting university.

schemes.name: Teaching Assistantship for M.Des Program
schemes.target_audience: Students pursuing a Master of Design (M.Des) program.
schemes.description: A teaching assistantship offered to students enrolled in the M.Des program to provide financial support.
schemes.benefits: Up to ₹3,000 per month.
required_docs: Proof of admission to M.Des program

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an enrolled student in the M.Des program.

schemes.application_mode: Through the admitting university.

schemes.name: Merit Scholarship for Engineering Programs based on JEE-Mains 2026 Rank
schemes.target_audience: Students seeking admission in Engineering programs with a valid JEE-Mains 2026 rank.
schemes.description: A merit-based scholarship for the academic session 2026-2027, offered to students based on their All India Rank (AIR) in the JEE-Mains 2026 examination.
schemes.benefits: Scholarship on semester fees, ranging from 10% to 100% based on AIR. For example, 100% for AIR up to 25,000.

eligibility_rules.description: Admission based on JEE-Mains 2026 AIR. The scholarship is offered to a maximum of 5% of total intake seats. Continuation requires maintaining a minimum of 7.5 CGPA.

schemes.application_mode: Awarded at the time of admission.

schemes.name: Merit Scholarship for MBA Programs (Entrance Exam Based)
schemes.target_audience: Students seeking admission to MBA programs with valid CAT/MAT/CMAT/ATMA/XAT scores.
schemes.description: A merit-based scholarship for students based on their percentile in national-level MBA entrance examinations.
schemes.benefits: Scholarship on semester fees, ranging from 10% to 50%. For example, 50% for a CAT score of 80 percentile or more.

eligibility_rules.description: Based on percentile in specified MBA entrance exams. Offered to a maximum of 10% of total intake seats. Continuation requires maintaining a minimum of 7.5 CGPA.

schemes.application_mode: Awarded at the time of admission.

schemes.name: Architecture Scholarship on the Basis of NATA/JEE (Main) Score
schemes.target_audience: Students seeking admission in the B.Arch. program.
schemes.description: A scholarship scheme to encourage meritorious students to get admission in the B.Arch. program for the academic session 2026-27, based on their NATA or JEE (Main) score.
schemes.benefits: Scholarship on the academic fees, with the percentage based on the NATA/JEE (Main) score.
required_docs: Valid NATA or JEE (Main) Paper 2 Scorecard

eligibility_rules.description: Must have a valid score in NATA or JEE (Main) Paper 2 and be admitted to the B.Arch. program for the 2026-27 session.

schemes.application_mode: Awarded at the time of admission.

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Startup Policy
schemes.target_audience: DPIIT-recognised startups and entrepreneurs incorporated in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A comprehensive policy by the Government of Uttar Pradesh to foster innovation and provide financial and infrastructural support to startups in sectors like IT, agriculture, healthcare, and manufacturing. The policy is valid for the period 2022-2027.
schemes.benefits: Provides prototype/seed grants up to ₹20 lakh, event participation support up to ₹1 lakh, and incubator support up to ₹1.25 crore.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a DPIIT-recognised startup incorporated in Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the official Uttar Pradesh startup portal

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Educated unemployed youth of Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A scheme to encourage educated but unemployed youth in Uttar Pradesh to establish their own enterprises in the industry and service sectors by providing financial assistance.
schemes.benefits: Provides margin money grant and interest subsidy on bank loans for setting up new ventures.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an educated, unemployed youth and a resident of Uttar Pradesh. Specific age and education criteria apply.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the DIUPMSME portal

schemes.name: Vishwakarma Shram Samman Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Local artisans and traditional entrepreneurs in Uttar Pradesh (e.g., carpenters, tailors, blacksmiths, potters)
schemes.description: Aimed at promoting and developing traditional industries and crafts by providing financial support and skill development to local artisans.
schemes.benefits: Provides margin money grant and interest subsidy on bank loans, along with skill development training and a free toolkit.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a traditional artisan and a resident of Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the official scheme portal

schemes.name: One District One Product (ODOP) Program
schemes.target_audience: MSMEs, artisans, and producers of indigenous and specialized products unique to each district of Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A flagship initiative by the UP Government to encourage and promote local, specialized products and crafts from each district, boosting manufacturing and employment.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for technology upgradation, marketing support, branding, skill development, and easier access to credit.
required_docs: Proof of business operation in the specific district

eligibility_rules.description: The business must be involved in the production of the identified product for its respective district in Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the ODOP UP portal

schemes.name: U.P. Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises Promotion Policy 2022
schemes.target_audience: Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A policy framework designed to promote the growth of MSMEs in Uttar Pradesh by providing various incentives, subsidies, and a conducive business environment.
schemes.benefits: Includes provisions for capital subsidy, interest subsidy, infrastructure development support, and incentives for quality certification and technology adoption.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered MSME operating within Uttar Pradesh and adhering to the policy guidelines.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the DIUPMSME portal

schemes.name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
schemes.target_audience: Early-stage, DPIIT-recognized startups across India
schemes.description: A central government scheme to provide financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market entry, and commercialization. The UP Startup Policy also leverages this fund.
schemes.benefits: Provides up to ₹20 Lakhs as a grant for validation of Proof of Concept, and up to ₹50 Lakhs of investment for market entry and scaling through incubators.

eligibility_rules.description: DPIIT recognized startup, incorporated not more than 2 years ago. Should not have received more than ₹10 lakh of monetary support under any other Central or State Government scheme.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Startup India portal, through selected incubators

schemes.name: Stand-Up India Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Women and Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) entrepreneurs
schemes.description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise. UP government schemes are often synchronized with this program.
schemes.benefits: Provides bank loan support from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for new enterprises in manufacturing, services, or the trading sector.

eligibility_rules.description: Entrepreneur must be a woman or belong to SC/ST category, above 18 years of age. The loan is only for greenfield (new) projects. The borrower should not be in default to any bank.

schemes.application_mode: Directly at bank branches, through the Stand-Up India portal, or via the Lead District Manager

schemes.name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
schemes.target_audience: Landholding farmer families
schemes.description: A central sector scheme operational since December 2018 to provide income support to all landholding farmer families. The scheme has a significant allocation of Rs 63,500 crore for 2026-27.
schemes.benefits: Provides direct income support of ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families in three equal installments.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to landholding farmer families across the state.

schemes.application_mode: Online via official portal and Common Service Centers (CSCs)

schemes.name: Namo Drone Didi Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Women Self-Help Groups (SHGs)
schemes.description: Launched in November 2024, this scheme aims to empower women by providing them with agricultural drones which can be rented to farmers for various agricultural purposes.
schemes.benefits: Provides a subsidy of up to 80% of the cost of a drone to women's self-help groups.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered Women Self-Help Group.

schemes.application_mode: Through designated state government channels

schemes.name: Modified Interest Subvention Scheme (MISS)
schemes.target_audience: Farmers with Kisan Credit Cards (KCC)
schemes.description: A scheme to make short-term agricultural credit more affordable for farmers, with an allocation of Rs 22,600 crore for 2026-27.
schemes.benefits: Provides interest subvention for short-term credit availed by farmers through Kisan Credit Cards.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers who avail short-term crop loans through Kisan Credit Cards from participating financial institutions.

schemes.application_mode: Automatically applied by banks when availing KCC loans

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.target_audience: All farmers, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers
schemes.description: A comprehensive crop insurance scheme to protect farmers against financial losses due to crop failure from natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
schemes.benefits: Provides insurance coverage and financial support for crop losses at affordable premium rates.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas are eligible. Enrollment must be completed before the sowing season begins.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the national crop insurance portal, banks, and Common Service Centers (CSCs)

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
schemes.target_audience: Farmers seeking to improve water use efficiency
schemes.description: A national mission focused on improving water use efficiency in agriculture through the adoption of modern irrigation techniques.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial assistance and subsidies for the installation of micro-irrigation systems like drip and sprinkler irrigation to save water and enhance crop yield.

eligibility_rules.description: All farmers are eligible to apply for support under the scheme's components.

schemes.application_mode: Through state agriculture departments

schemes.name: Bharat Vistar (AI-enabled Agri Stack)
schemes.target_audience: Small and marginal farmers
schemes.description: An AI-enabled digital public infrastructure for agriculture that integrates AgriStack with AI advisory systems to provide data-driven support to farmers.
schemes.benefits: Offers customized, data-driven advisory services to farmers for improved on-farm decision-making, risk reduction, and better market connectivity.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to all farmers, with a special focus on small and marginal farmers to improve their livelihoods through technology.

schemes.application_mode: Digital platform and associated mobile applications

schemes.name: Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs) Promotion Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Groups of farmers, especially small and marginal farmers
schemes.description: A policy initiative receiving increased funding and support in 2026 to encourage farmers to form and join FPOs.
schemes.benefits: Allows farmers to achieve economies of scale, improve bargaining power, access modern technology, and connect more effectively with markets.

eligibility_rules.description: Groups of farmers can form an FPO and register it under the relevant acts to avail benefits.

schemes.application_mode: Through designated implementing agencies like NABARD and SFAC

schemes.name: Mission Shakti
schemes.target_audience: Women and girls in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A comprehensive program aimed at ensuring the safety, security, and dignity of women and girls, promoting their empowerment and self-reliance through awareness campaigns and institutional strengthening.
schemes.benefits: Enhanced safety through increased police visibility and technology, awareness campaigns on women's rights and government schemes, and promotion of economic self-reliance.

eligibility_rules.description: All women and girls residing in Uttar Pradesh are covered under the safety and awareness components of the mission. Specific sub-schemes may have additional criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal and offline through designated government offices for specific components.

schemes.name: Safe City Project
schemes.target_audience: Women, children, and senior citizens in urban areas
schemes.description: An initiative to create a safe, secure, and empowering environment for women in public places through technology and infrastructure upgrades.
schemes.benefits: Installation of CCTV cameras in strategic locations, improved street lighting, deployment of women police patrols (pink patrols), and integration with emergency response systems like Dial 112.
required_docs: Not applicable for general public benefits

eligibility_rules.description: The project is implemented in select cities in Uttar Pradesh to benefit all residents, with a special focus on enhancing the safety of women.

schemes.application_mode: Not applicable (Infrastructure and service-based scheme)

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Girl children from economically weaker families
schemes.description: A conditional cash transfer scheme to support the education and health of a girl child, aimed at curbing female foeticide and promoting a positive social attitude towards girls.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance provided in six installments at various stages of a girl's life: at birth, upon completing one-year vaccination, admission to classes 1, 6, 9, and upon completing graduation or a diploma course.
required_docs: Birth Certificate of the girl child
Aadhaar Card of parents and child

eligibility_rules.description: Resident of Uttar Pradesh with an annual family income not exceeding INR 3 lakhs. Applicable for up to two daughters in a family.
