schemes.application_mode: Online through the official MKSY portal or offline via Block Development Officer.

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Marriage Grant Scheme (Shadi Anudan Yojana)
schemes.target_audience: Daughters from poor families belonging to minority, SC, ST, and OBC categories
schemes.description: A scheme to provide financial assistance for the marriage of daughters from economically weaker sections of society.
schemes.benefits: One-time financial assistance to the family for conducting the daughter's marriage.
required_docs: Aadhaar Card of bride and groom
Bank Account Details of the applicant (parent/guardian)

eligibility_rules.description: The bride must be a resident of Uttar Pradesh and at least 18 years old, while the groom must be at least 21. Annual family income limits apply (e.g., under INR 56,460 for urban areas and INR 46,080 for rural areas).

schemes.application_mode: Online through the official state government portal.

schemes.name: LaQshya – Labour Room Quality Improvement Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Pregnant women delivering in public health facilities
schemes.description: An initiative to improve the quality of care in labour rooms and maternity operation theatres in public health facilities, aiming to reduce preventable maternal and newborn mortality and morbidity.
schemes.benefits: Improved infrastructure, availability of essential drugs, trained staff, and adherence to clinical protocols, leading to respectful maternity care and better health outcomes for mother and child.

eligibility_rules.description: All pregnant women who choose to deliver at government medical colleges, district hospitals, and designated community health centers where the LaQshya program is implemented.

schemes.application_mode: Not applicable (Service improvement initiative at health facilities)

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
schemes.target_audience: Poor and vulnerable families identified based on SECC 2011 data and state-specific criteria
schemes.description: A national health protection scheme providing health insurance coverage to poor and vulnerable families for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
schemes.benefits: Health coverage of up to INR 5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization at empanelled public and private hospitals across the country.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility is based on deprivation and occupational criteria from the Socio-Economic Caste Census (SECC) 2011 for rural and urban areas, respectively.

schemes.application_mode: Beneficiaries are pre-identified. Eligible individuals can get their Ayushman card made at empanelled hospitals or Common Service Centers (CSCs).

schemes.name: National Health Mission (NHM) - Maternal and Child Health
schemes.target_audience: Pregnant women, mothers, and children in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A comprehensive health mission implemented in Uttar Pradesh to strengthen the healthcare system and reduce maternal and child mortality through various interventions.
schemes.benefits: Includes Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK) for free and cashless services for pregnant women and sick newborns, immunization programs, and strengthening of health infrastructure.

eligibility_rules.description: All residents of Uttar Pradesh, particularly pregnant women, lactating mothers, and children, are eligible for services under NHM at public health facilities.

schemes.application_mode: Services are accessed directly at public health facilities like Sub-Centres, PHCs, CHCs, and District Hospitals.

schemes.name: U.P. Skill Development Mission (UPSDM)
schemes.target_audience: Eligible youth in the 14-35 age group, including women, persons with disabilities, and minorities.
schemes.description: A state mission to integrate efforts of various government departments to provide employment-oriented and placement-linked training in vocational skills. The mission aims to train all eligible youth in their preferred trades and ensure placement for at least 70% of them.
schemes.benefits: Provides NSQF (National Skills Qualifications Framework) compliant courses, facilities for skill acquisition and upgradation, and placement assistance in wage and self-employment.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be an eligible youth in the 14-35 age group. The mission has earmarked targets of 30% for women and 20% for minorities.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration via the UPSDM Portal.

schemes.name: Berojgari Bhatta Yojna
schemes.target_audience: Educated unemployed youth of Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A scheme to provide financial assistance in the form of an unemployment allowance to educated youth who are searching for employment but are facing financial crisis.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial assistance of Rupees 1,000 to Rupees 1,500 per month until the beneficiary gets a job. The scheme also provides a portal to search for private and government jobs.
required_docs: Proof of permanent residence in Uttar Pradesh

eligibility_rules.description: The candidate must be a permanent resident of Uttar Pradesh, have passed at least the 10th standard, be currently unemployed, be between 21-35 years of age, and have a total family income not exceeding Rupees 3 lakhs per annum.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: DRDO Skill Development Program 2026 (DTTC, Lucknow)
schemes.target_audience: Professionals, researchers, academicians, and industry participants.
schemes.description: A series of focused, short-duration training programs by DRDO's Defence Technology & Test Centre (DTTC) in Lucknow. The program aims to strengthen technical competencies in key areas of Defence, Aerospace, and Strategic Technologies.
schemes.benefits: Expert-led sessions from DRDO scientists on emerging technologies like AI/ML, Drone Technology, and Composite Materials. Provides hands-on exposure and focuses on testing and certification.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to professionals, researchers, academicians, and industry participants who can provide a recommendation from their affiliated organization.

schemes.application_mode: Registration by submitting documents to the concerned Course Coordinator.

schemes.name: Chief Minister's Youth Entrepreneur Development Campaign
schemes.target_audience: Youth aspiring to become entrepreneurs.
schemes.description: A state-level campaign to promote self-reliance by encouraging youth to become entrepreneurs. The goal is to facilitate the establishment of 100,000 new micro-enterprises every year.
schemes.benefits: Provides a supportive ecosystem and encouragement for youth to establish new micro-enterprises, contributing to self-employment and job creation.

eligibility_rules.description: Aimed at youth in Uttar Pradesh who wish to start their own micro-enterprise.

schemes.application_mode: Through designated government channels for MSME and startup support.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
schemes.target_audience: Youth from diverse backgrounds, including women, SC, ST, OBC, and those in rural/remote regions.
schemes.description: A flagship scheme of the Central Government, actively implemented in Uttar Pradesh, to provide industry-relevant skill development training to Indian youth. It covers a wide range of sectors and includes Recognition of Prior Learning (RPL).
schemes.benefits: Provides certified, quality-assured training in sectors like manufacturing, healthcare, IT, and retail, enhancing employability and access to job opportunities.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to Indian youth, with a focus on inclusivity for women (45% of beneficiaries) and individuals from SC, ST, and OBC categories.

schemes.application_mode: Enrollment through authorized training centers.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U) 2.0
schemes.target_audience: First-time homeowners in urban India, including Economically Weaker Section (EWS), Low Income Group (LIG), and Middle Income Group (MIG) segments.
schemes.description: An expanded phase of the flagship central government scheme aimed at providing 'Housing for All' in urban areas. It focuses on enabling home ownership through various financial assistance components, with a renewed emphasis in 2026.
schemes.benefits: Provides interest subsidy on home loans via the Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS), gives preference for women ownership or co-ownership, and is applicable for both new construction and ready-to-move homes.
required_docs: Proof of not owning a pucca house

eligibility_rules.description: The applicant or their spouse must not own a pucca house anywhere in India. The applicant must belong to EWS, LIG, or MIG income categories and the property size must fall within scheme limits.

schemes.application_mode: Online through government portals and approved financial institutions.

schemes.name: GDA Housing Scheme 2026
schemes.target_audience: Long-term residents of Ghaziabad, including Economically Weaker Section (EWS) beneficiaries.
schemes.description: A scheme by the Ghaziabad Development Authority (GDA) to provide well-designed and comfortable homes to qualified citizens. It includes specific projects like the Aashrayam Building in Gram Dasna and Shri Ram Nath View Apartment in Gram Noornagar.
schemes.benefits: Provision of affordable dwelling units. For example, 312 units are available for EWS beneficiaries in Gram Dasna and 147 units in Gram Noornagar.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must be qualified citizens and long-term residents of Ghaziabad. Specific projects may have criteria for EWS beneficiaries.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration by filling out the form on the scheme’s website. The application period is from 1st January 2026 to 31st January 2026.

schemes.name: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS) 2026
schemes.target_audience: First-time home buyers from EWS, LIG, or MIG categories.
schemes.description: A key component of PMAY-U that provides an upfront interest subsidy on home loans taken from approved financial institutions for purchasing or constructing a house.
schemes.benefits: Reduces the principal outstanding amount of the home loan, leading to lower Equated Monthly Installments (EMIs).
required_docs: Proof of not owning a pucca house

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant or their spouse should not own a pucca house. Must meet the income limits for EWS, LIG, or MIG categories. The property size must be within scheme limits and the loan must be from an approved financial institution.

schemes.application_mode: Applied through approved lending institutions (banks, housing finance companies) at the time of taking a home loan.

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Urban (SBM-U)
schemes.target_audience: General urban population.
schemes.description: A nationwide campaign focused on achieving cleanliness, sanitation, and proper waste management in urban areas of India.
schemes.benefits: Improved sanitation facilities, cleaner public spaces, effective solid waste management, and better public health outcomes for urban residents.
required_docs: Not applicable for individual beneficiaries in this context.

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme is implemented by Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) across the state.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by municipal corporations and other Urban Local Bodies.

schemes.name: AMRUT (Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation)
schemes.target_audience: Residents of selected cities and towns in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A central government mission aimed at establishing robust infrastructure for water supply, sewage networks, and other urban amenities to improve the quality of life.
schemes.benefits: Ensures access to tap water and sewerage connections for every household, develops green spaces and parks, and improves urban transport.

eligibility_rules.description: Implemented in designated cities and towns by state governments and Urban Local Bodies to improve core urban infrastructure.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented through State Level High Powered Steering Committees (SHPSC) and Urban Local Bodies.

schemes.name: UP Aspirational Cities Program (UP-ACP)
schemes.target_audience: Residents of designated aspirational cities in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A state-level program anchored by the Urban Development Department to foster integrated, inter-sectoral planning to improve health outcomes, quality of life, and overall development in smaller cities.
schemes.benefits: Leads to the creation of integrated City Action Plans (iCAPs) that address hyperlocal problems and improve public health and urban infrastructure through a system-led approach.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to cities designated as 'Aspirational Cities' by the Uttar Pradesh government.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the Urban Development Department, Government of UP, in collaboration with city administrations and development partners.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized sector workers like street vendors, construction workers, auto drivers, etc.
schemes.description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme designed to provide old age protection and social security for Unorganized Workers (UW).
schemes.benefits: Provides an assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after attaining the age of 60. The scheme involves a 50% monthly contribution by the beneficiary with an equal matching contribution from the Central Government.
required_docs: Savings Bank Account / Jan Dhan account number with IFSC

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an unorganized worker and not a member of EPFO/ESIC/NPS (government funded).

schemes.application_mode: Online via e-Shram portal or through Common Service Centers (CSC).

schemes.name: National Pension Scheme for Traders and Self-Employed Persons
schemes.target_audience: Small traders and self-employed individuals.
schemes.description: A pension scheme dedicated to small-scale traders and self-employed persons, offering a monthly pension with a government co-contribution model.
schemes.benefits: Offers a monthly pension of ₹3,000 after the beneficiary reaches 60 years of age.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to individuals with an annual business return of up to ₹1.5 crore.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration or through Common Service Centers (CSC).

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Mandhan Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Small and Marginal Farmers
schemes.description: A government scheme that provides social security to Small and Marginal Farmers in their old age when they have no means of livelihood and minimal or no savings.
schemes.benefits: Provides a minimum fixed pension of ₹3,000 per month on attaining the age of 60 years.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a Small and Marginal Farmer.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration or through Common Service Centers (CSC).

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized sector workers and all Indian citizens with a bank account.
schemes.description: A government-backed accident insurance scheme in India, integrated with the e-Shram portal to extend social security coverage to unorganized workers.
schemes.benefits: Provides insurance coverage for accidental death and disability. It is integrated with the e-Shram portal to enhance social security for unorganized workers.

eligibility_rules.description: Available to any Indian citizen with a bank account.

schemes.application_mode: Through participating banks and integrated with the e-Shram portal.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized sector workers and all Indian citizens with a bank account.
schemes.description: A government-backed life insurance scheme in India. It is integrated with the e-Shram portal to provide a safety net for the families of unorganized workers.
schemes.benefits: Provides life insurance coverage in case of death due to any reason. The scheme is mapped with the e-Shram portal for easy access.

eligibility_rules.description: Available to any Indian citizen with a bank account.

schemes.application_mode: Through participating banks and integrated with the e-Shram portal.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized workers, gig workers, and economically weaker sections.
schemes.description: A flagship scheme of the Government of India to provide health coverage to low-income earners. The scheme is integrated with e-Shram to extend benefits to registered unorganized workers.
schemes.benefits: Provides healthcare security and financial protection for hospitalization expenses. It is integrated with the e-Shram portal to cover unorganized and gig workers.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility is based on the Socio-Economic Caste Census (SECC) database and is extended to workers registered on the e-Shram portal.

schemes.application_mode: Automatic inclusion for eligible families, registration via e-Shram portal, or at Common Service Centers (CSC).

schemes.name: e-Shram Portal Registration
schemes.target_audience: All unorganized sector workers, including gig and platform workers.
schemes.description: A national initiative to create a comprehensive database of unorganized workers to provide them with a Universal Account Number (UAN) and link them to various social security schemes.
schemes.benefits: Provides a unique UAN ID card and facilitates access to multiple social security and welfare schemes offered by the central and state governments.

eligibility_rules.description: Any individual working in the unorganized sector who is not an income tax payee or a member of EPFO/ESIC.

schemes.application_mode: Online self-registration on the e-Shram portal or through Common Service Centers (CSC).

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Data Centre and AI Mission
schemes.target_audience: Technology companies, investors, IT professionals
schemes.description: A strategic initiative from the 2026-27 budget to establish Uttar Pradesh as a global digital hub through major investments in data centres, artificial intelligence, and robotics.
schemes.benefits: Aims to create robust digital infrastructure, generate employment, strengthen governance, attract investment, and accelerate innovation.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to domestic and international companies looking to invest in data centres, AI, and robotics infrastructure within Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online via state investment promotion portal

schemes.name: HCL-Foxconn Semiconductor Unit Project
schemes.target_audience: Semiconductor industry, electronics manufacturers, skilled engineers
schemes.description: A landmark project involving HCL and Foxconn to establish a semiconductor manufacturing unit in Uttar Pradesh, described as a major step towards technological self-reliance.
schemes.benefits: Boosts India's chip manufacturing capacity, fosters global leadership in the sector, creates high-skilled jobs, and attracts ancillary industries.

eligibility_rules.description: A strategic partnership project between HCL, Foxconn, and the Government of Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Government-led initiative

schemes.name: Digital Tehsil Transformation Initiative
schemes.target_audience: General citizens, landowners, farmers
schemes.description: An initiative to upgrade all tehsils into modern, digital centers by June 2026. It will introduce AI-enabled systems and blockchain technology for revenue services.
schemes.benefits: Enhances transparency and efficiency in services like land registration and dispute resolution, reduces corruption, and improves citizen-centric governance.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to all citizens of Uttar Pradesh requiring services from tehsil (revenue) offices.

schemes.application_mode: Directly at modernized Tehsil offices and associated online portals

schemes.name: UP Startup Incubator Hub
schemes.target_audience: Entrepreneurs, early-stage startups, innovators
schemes.description: A scheme to establish a major startup incubator hub in the state capital, Lucknow, to strengthen the ecosystem for new businesses.
schemes.benefits: Provides startups with infrastructure, mentorship, funding opportunities, and networking to foster innovation and create employment.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to registered startups and entrepreneurs with innovative and scalable business ideas seeking incubation support.

schemes.application_mode: Online application through the state's startup portal

schemes.name: Youth Skilling for Future Tech Program
schemes.target_audience: Youth, students, unemployed individuals
schemes.description: A program with focused allocations in the 2026-27 budget to empower millions of youths with future-ready skills in AI, robotics, and other emerging technologies.
schemes.benefits: Increases employability, creates a skilled workforce for the tech industry, and supports the state's digital transformation goals.
required_docs: Proof of residence in Uttar Pradesh

eligibility_rules.description: Available for the youth of Uttar Pradesh aiming to acquire skills in high-demand technology sectors.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration via the UP Skill Development Mission portal

schemes.name: Semiconductor Park Development Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Semiconductor manufacturing companies, electronics component makers, investors
schemes.description: An initiative to develop a dedicated Semiconductor Park to create a comprehensive ecosystem for chip design and manufacturing, expected to contribute significantly to the state's GDP.
schemes.benefits: Attracts large-scale domestic and foreign investment, generates substantial employment, and establishes a specialized industrial hub.

eligibility_rules.description: Aimed at companies in the semiconductor value chain willing to establish manufacturing or R&D facilities in the designated park.

schemes.application_mode: Through Uttar Pradesh State Industrial Development Authority (UPSIDA)

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh State Smart City Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Urban residents, Municipal Corporations
schemes.description: A state-funded scheme to develop 7 smart cities, complementing the central government's Smart Cities Mission. It focuses on leveraging technology for urban development and citizen services.
schemes.benefits: Improves urban infrastructure, enhances quality of life, and implements technology-driven solutions for traffic management, waste disposal, and governance.
required_docs: Detailed Project Report (DPR) from the city's municipal corporation

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to the 7 cities selected by the state government for development under its own funding scheme.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the Urban Development Department and respective city-level Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs)

schemes.name: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana (Central Subsidy)
schemes.target_audience: Residential homeowners in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A central government flagship scheme providing financial assistance to homeowners for installing rooftop solar systems to promote clean energy.
schemes.benefits: Provides a subsidy of ₹30,000 per kW for the first 2 kW and ₹18,000 per kW for additional capacity up to 3 kW. The subsidy is transferred directly to the consumer's bank account.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be an Indian citizen and own a house with a roof suitable for solar panel installation. The property must have a valid electricity connection.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the National Portal for Rooftop Solar

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh State Rooftop Solar Subsidy
schemes.target_audience: Private residential sector consumers
schemes.description: A state-level subsidy provided by the Uttar Pradesh New and Renewable Energy Development Agency (UPNEDA) as an additional incentive on top of the central financial assistance.
schemes.benefits: Provides a state subsidy of ₹15,000 per kW for systems between 1-2 kW, and a flat subsidy of ₹30,000 for systems 2 kW and above.
required_docs: Bank Details for Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT)

eligibility_rules.description: Available to residential consumers in Uttar Pradesh installing new grid-connected rooftop solar systems.

schemes.application_mode: Online via UPNEDA portal or in conjunction with the National Portal application

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Solar Energy Policy 2022
schemes.target_audience: Solar power developers, industries, government bodies, and residents
schemes.description: A comprehensive state policy aiming to achieve a target of 22,000 MW of solar power generation capacity by the fiscal year 2026-27 through various initiatives.
schemes.benefits: Establishes a framework for developing solar parks, utility-scale projects, and rooftop solar. Includes provisions for net metering, subsidies, and training programs to create a robust solar ecosystem.
required_docs: Varies based on the specific initiative under the policy (e.g., project proposals, land documents).

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility criteria depend on the specific component of the policy being accessed, such as setting up a solar park or a residential rooftop system.

schemes.application_mode: Through UPNEDA (Uttar Pradesh New and Renewable Energy Development Agency)

schemes.name: UP Solar Cities Development Program
schemes.target_audience: Municipal corporations, government buildings, and residents in designated cities
schemes.description: An initiative under the state's solar policy to develop Ayodhya as a 'Model Solar City' and 16 other Municipal Corporations plus Noida city as 'Solar Cities' to accelerate the urban energy transition.
schemes.benefits: Focused investment in solar infrastructure, including covering government buildings, schools, and colleges with solar rooftop plants, and promoting residential adoption in these cities.
required_docs: Standard residential application documents for individuals

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to public and private entities and residents located within the 18 designated cities.

schemes.application_mode: Through Municipal Corporations and UPNEDA

schemes.name: Surya Mitra Skill Development Program
schemes.target_audience: Unemployed youth in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A skill development program designed to train 30,000 youth as 'Surya Mitras' (solar technicians) over five years to create a skilled workforce for the expanding solar industry.
schemes.benefits: Provides technical training, certification, and enhanced employment opportunities in solar panel installation, operation, and maintenance.

eligibility_rules.description: Aimed at youth in Uttar Pradesh seeking to build a career in the renewable energy sector.

schemes.application_mode: Application through UPNEDA designated training centers

schemes.name: Solarization of Agriculture Feeders and Private Tube Wells
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A scheme focused on solarizing segregated agriculture feeders and providing grid-connected solar power systems for private tube wells to ensure reliable and affordable power for irrigation.
schemes.benefits: Reduces farmers' dependency on the conventional grid, lowers electricity costs for irrigation, and provides a stable power supply, enhancing crop planning and safety.
required_docs: Proof of existing tube well connection

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a farmer in Uttar Pradesh with a private tube well or connected to a designated agricultural feeder.

schemes.application_mode: Through UPNEDA and local electricity distribution companies (DISCOMs)

schemes.name: Net Metering Facility for Rooftop Solar
schemes.target_audience: Residential consumers, government buildings, and educational institutions
schemes.description: A billing mechanism that allows owners of grid-connected rooftop solar systems to feed excess electricity they generate back into the grid.
schemes.benefits: Consumers receive financial credit for the surplus energy supplied to the grid, which is adjusted against their monthly electricity bill, leading to significant savings.
required_docs: Technical specifications of the solar system

eligibility_rules.description: Must have a grid-connected rooftop solar system installed as per the regulations of the UP Electricity Regulatory Commission (UPERC).

schemes.application_mode: Application submitted to the local power distribution company (DISCOM)

schemes.name: Divyangjan Kaushal Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Persons with Disabilities (PwDs)
schemes.description: A livelihood-focused scheme designed to align the skill sets of persons with disabilities with the modern digital and service economy, moving beyond traditional vocational training.
schemes.benefits: Provides skill development and training to enhance employability in modern sectors, fostering economic independence and integration into the workforce.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a person with a disability as defined by the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016, and a resident of Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state government portal or at designated skill development centers.

schemes.name: Divyang Sahara Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) and senior citizens with age-related mobility or sensory issues.
schemes.description: An accessibility-focused scheme that aims to bridge the gap between skills and employment by providing access to appropriate assistive technology.
schemes.benefits: Provision of mass-produced, AI-enabled, high-quality assistive devices to improve productivity, job retention, reduce workplace barriers, and enhance independent functioning.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to Persons with Disabilities and senior citizens residing in Uttar Pradesh who require assistive technology for mobility, sensory, or functional enhancement.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal and designated government offices.

schemes.name: Scheme of Assistance to Persons with Disabilities for Purchase/Fitting of Aids/Appliances (ADIP Scheme)
schemes.target_audience: Needy persons with disabilities.
schemes.description: A central government scheme to assist needy persons with disabilities in procuring durable, sophisticated, and scientifically manufactured, modern aids and appliances to promote their physical, social, and psychological rehabilitation.
schemes.benefits: Provides assistive devices to improve independent functioning and may cover the cost of corrective surgeries required before fitting an assistive device.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility is based on the income level of the beneficiary. The scheme is applicable to all Indian citizens with a certified disability.

schemes.application_mode: Through implementing agencies such as ALIMCO, National Institutes, Composite Regional Centres, and designated NGOs.

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Divyangjan Pension Scheme (Enhanced)
schemes.target_audience: Divyangjan (Persons with Disabilities) in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A social security scheme providing monthly financial assistance to persons with disabilities to support their livelihood. The 2026-27 state budget includes provisions for an enhanced pension amount.
schemes.benefits: Provides an enhanced monthly pension to eligible beneficiaries to meet their basic needs.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a resident of Uttar Pradesh with a disability of 40% or more and meet the income criteria set by the state government.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state's social welfare or integrated pension portal.

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Grants to Voluntary Groups for Disability Rehabilitation
schemes.target_audience: Voluntary organizations and NGOs working for the welfare of Persons with Disabilities.
schemes.description: A new initiative offering grants to voluntary groups to support comprehensive rehabilitation for persons with 21 types of disabilities, focusing on early intervention, education, and skill development.
schemes.benefits: Financial grants to eligible organizations to run programs that foster self-reliance and mainstream inclusion for PwDs.
required_docs: Annual Reports and Audited Financial Statements

eligibility_rules.description: Registered voluntary organizations working in the disability sector within Uttar Pradesh. The specific program mentioned excludes support for mental retardation and mental illness.

schemes.application_mode: Application through the Uttar Pradesh Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities.

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Scholarship Scheme for Divyangjan Students
schemes.target_audience: Students with disabilities in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A scheme providing financial assistance through scholarships to support the education of students with disabilities. The 2026-27 budget proposes increased financial aid under this scheme.
schemes.benefits: Financial aid to cover educational expenses such as tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and purchase of books or equipment.
required_docs: Proof of Admission in a recognized educational institution

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a student with a certified disability enrolled in a recognized educational institution in Uttar Pradesh and meet the prescribed income and academic criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state's scholarship and fee reimbursement portal.

schemes.name: Ashram Paddhati Vidyalaya scheme
schemes.target_audience: Students belonging to Scheduled Caste, Vimukta Jati, Other Backward Classes and General Category in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: This scheme aims for the educational upliftment of students by providing residential schooling facilities.
schemes.benefits: Free education, housing, food, clothing, stationery, and sports facilities are provided to students from class 1st to 12th.

eligibility_rules.description: Students must be enrolled in class 1st to 12th and belong to the specified categories.

schemes.application_mode: Offline through district social welfare offices.

schemes.name: Leadership Development Scheme for Vimukt, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic tribes
schemes.target_audience: High-scoring students from Vimukt, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic tribes in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: Aims to develop leadership abilities among meritorious students from Vimukt, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic tribes.
schemes.benefits: Selected students are invited to leadership development camps to enhance their leadership skills.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must be boys or girls who scored the highest marks in class 10th and 12th from their respective districts in Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Through district administration and educational departments.

schemes.name: Excellence Award Scheme for Social Workers
schemes.target_audience: Social workers from De-Notified and Nomadic Tribes in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: This scheme recognizes and awards social workers for their outstanding contributions to the social and economic upliftment of Vimukt, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic tribes.
schemes.benefits: An award of Rs 1.00 lakh is provided to the selected social worker.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a social worker who has done excellent work for the social and economic upliftment of Vimukt, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic tribes.

schemes.application_mode: Nomination through the state's social welfare department.

schemes.name: Assistance to students of Nomadic / Denotified Tribes studying in self finance institutes
schemes.target_audience: Students from Nomadic / Denotified tribes (NT/DNT) in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: Provides financial assistance in the form of scholarships to NT/DNT students studying in government-certified self-financed institutions.
schemes.benefits: A scholarship of Rs. 50,000 is provided to eligible students.
required_docs: Admission proof from a certified self-financed institution

eligibility_rules.description: The student must belong to a Nomadic or Denotified tribe and be studying in a government-certified self-financed institution.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state scholarship portal.

schemes.name: Development Action Plan for Scheduled Tribes (DAPST)
schemes.target_audience: Scheduled Tribes (STs) and communities in areas with tribal concentration.
schemes.description: A national strategy for the development of Scheduled Tribes where various Central Ministries allocate a percentage of their budget for tribal development projects.
schemes.benefits: Funds various tribal development projects to bridge the developmental gap between ST and non-ST populations.

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme targets the development of Scheduled Tribes and tribal concentration areas across the country.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented through Central Ministries and State Governments.

schemes.name: Post Matric Scholarship for STs
schemes.target_audience: Scheduled Tribe (ST) students pursuing post-matriculation education.
schemes.description: A centrally sponsored scheme to provide financial assistance to ST students studying at post-matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education.
schemes.benefits: Covers tuition fees, compulsory non-refundable fees, and provides a maintenance allowance.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a Scheduled Tribe student pursuing a post-matriculation course in a recognized institution. Parental income limits apply.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the National Scholarship Portal (NSP) or state portals.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Anusuchit Jaati Abhyuday Yojna (PM-AJAY)
schemes.target_audience: Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals and communities.
schemes.description: A merged comprehensive scheme for the socio-economic development of SC communities through grants for infrastructure development, skill development, and income-generating schemes.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for infrastructure in SC-dominated villages, skill training, and support for economic development activities.

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme is targeted at villages with a significant SC population and SC individuals seeking economic upliftment.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by State Governments/UT Administrations and their agencies.

schemes.name: Scheme for Economic Empowerment of DNTs (SEED)
schemes.target_audience: De-notified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes (DNTs).
schemes.description: A scheme for the welfare of DNT communities, focusing on educational empowerment, health insurance, livelihood support, and housing.
schemes.benefits: Provides free coaching for competitive exams, health insurance through PM-JAY, financial assistance for livelihood initiatives, and housing assistance through PMAY.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must belong to a De-notified, Nomadic or Semi-Nomadic Tribe and have an annual family income not exceeding Rs. 2.50 lakh.

schemes.application_mode: Online through a dedicated web portal.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Entrepreneurship Development in Animal Husbandry
schemes.target_audience: Livestock Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs), startups, and individual entrepreneurs in the dairy and animal husbandry sector.
schemes.description: A new scheme announced in the 2026 budget to foster entrepreneurship in the animal husbandry sector. It aims to create high-quality rural employment and promote innovation in cattle rearing, dairy processing, feed production, and veterinary services.
schemes.benefits: Provides credit-linked subsidies and support. Includes provisions for loan-linked capital subsidies to establish private veterinary colleges, rural veterinary hospitals, diagnostic laboratories, and breeding centres.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligible entities include FPOs, startups, and individual entrepreneurs operating within the animal husbandry and dairy sectors in Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the designated state government portal.

schemes.name: Destitute Cattle Care and Maintenance Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Organizations and bodies responsible for the care of destitute and stray cattle.
schemes.description: A scheme with a significant budget allocation of ₹2,000 crore for the maintenance and care of destitute cattle across the state, aiming to address the issue of stray animals.
schemes.benefits: Financial allocation for the shelter, feed, and healthcare of destitute cattle.
required_docs: Registration documents of the organization (e.g., Gaushala)
Bank account details of the organization

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to registered cattle shelters and government-approved organizations involved in animal welfare.

schemes.application_mode: Through the Department of Animal Husbandry, Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Fisheries Infrastructure Development Program
schemes.target_audience: Fish farmers, fisheries cooperatives, and entrepreneurs in the aquaculture sector.
schemes.description: A comprehensive program with a ₹100 crore allocation to make Uttar Pradesh a leading state in fish production. It focuses on developing key infrastructure to support the entire fisheries value chain.
schemes.benefits: Funding for the establishment of a World Fish Center, fish seed and brood banks, fish processing centers, modern fish markets, and the development of integrated aqua parks.
required_docs: Land ownership documents or lease agreement for water body

eligibility_rules.description: Individuals, groups, or organizations involved in or proposing to start activities in the fisheries sector within Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online or offline through the state's Department of Fisheries.

schemes.name: National Livestock Mission (NLM)
schemes.target_audience: Livestock farmers, farmer producer organizations, and entrepreneurs in the livestock sector.
schemes.description: A centrally sponsored scheme aimed at the sustainable development of the livestock sector, with a focus on improving breeds, feed and fodder availability, and skill development.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance, subsidies, and technical support for entrepreneurship development, breed improvement, and fodder development in the livestock sector, including cattle, ruminants, and other small livestock.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility varies by sub-component but generally includes individual farmers, FPOs, Self-Help Groups, and entrepreneurs in the livestock sector.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the National Livestock Mission portal and facilitated by state implementing agencies.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Gokul Mission (RGM)
schemes.target_audience: Cattle breeders, farmers, and institutions involved in the conservation of indigenous bovine breeds.
schemes.description: A national mission focused on the conservation and development of indigenous bovine breeds in a scientific and holistic manner to enhance milk production and productivity.
schemes.benefits: Support for establishing integrated indigenous cattle centres (Gokul Grams), bull mother farms, and providing subsidies for high-genetic merit bulls for natural service.
required_docs: Proof of ownership of indigenous cattle

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers and breeders' societies involved in the rearing and conservation of recognized indigenous cattle breeds.

schemes.application_mode: Through the State Implementing Agency for Animal Husbandry.

schemes.name: Dairy Development Scheme (Dairying Through Cooperatives)
schemes.target_audience: Milk Unions, State Milk Federations, and Dairy Cooperatives.
schemes.description: A scheme aimed at strengthening the dairy cooperative network in the state. It includes a component initiated in cooperation with the Japan International Co-operative Agency (JICA) through ODA loan assistance.
schemes.benefits: Release of funds to different Milk Unions and State Milk Federations for approved projects to enhance dairy infrastructure and processing capabilities.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered and operational Milk Union, State Milk Federation, or a part of the dairy cooperative structure in Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Proposal-based application through the State Cooperative Dairy Federation.

schemes.name: Rural Livelihood Promotion through Small Livestock Farming
schemes.target_audience: Self-help groups (SHGs) and rural women.
schemes.description: An initiative to promote rural employment and empower women by encouraging goat rearing, sheep farming, piggery, and poultry farming. The goal is to generate new sources of income and strengthen the rural economy.
schemes.benefits: Government encouragement and support for establishing small livestock and poultry farms, likely including training, financial assistance, and market linkages.
required_docs: Brief proposal for the farming activity

eligibility_rules.description: Primarily targeted at members of registered Self-Help Groups and women in rural areas of Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Through local block development offices and rural livelihood missions.

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Export Promotion Policy 2025-30
schemes.target_audience: Exporters, manufacturers, and MSMEs in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A policy launched by the Uttar Pradesh government to boost international trade, enhance domestic manufacturing, and establish the state as a globally recognized export powerhouse.
schemes.benefits: Integrates financial incentives, infrastructure support, digital enablement, and performance-linked rewards to transform Uttar Pradesh into a competitive export hub.
required_docs: Proof of business operations in Uttar Pradesh

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to exporters, manufacturers, and MSMEs operating within Uttar Pradesh, with a focus on boosting exports and generating employment.

schemes.application_mode: Online via state government portal

schemes.name: PLI Scheme for National Programme on High Efficiency Solar PV Modules
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of high-efficiency solar PV modules
schemes.description: A national scheme to build an ecosystem for manufacturing high-efficiency solar PV modules in India, aiming to reduce import dependence in the renewable energy sector.
schemes.benefits: Provides performance-linked incentives to achieve Giga Watt (GW) scale manufacturing capacity, promote cutting-edge technology, and encourage the setup of integrated plants.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must commit to setting up a manufacturing plant for high-efficiency solar PV modules in India, meeting specified capacity and technology criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Online via Ministry of New & Renewable Energy (MNRE) portal

schemes.name: PLI Scheme for Automobile & Auto Components Industry (PLI-Auto)
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of Advanced Automotive Technology (AAT) vehicles and components
schemes.description: A scheme to boost domestic manufacturing of high-value Advanced Automotive Technology (AAT) vehicles and products to enhance India's manufacturing capabilities and export potential.
schemes.benefits: Provides performance-linked incentives on incremental sales of AAT vehicles and components over a base year.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to existing automotive companies as well as new investors who meet the prescribed thresholds for investment and revenue in the AAT segment.

schemes.application_mode: Online via Ministry of Heavy Industries portal

schemes.name: PLI Scheme for Large Scale Electronics Manufacturing
schemes.target_audience: Large-scale manufacturers of mobile phones and specified electronic components
schemes.description: A scheme designed to attract significant investments in the electronics manufacturing sector, positioning India as a global hub for electronics production.
schemes.benefits: Offers a production-linked incentive on incremental sales of goods manufactured in India for a period of five years.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must meet minimum investment and incremental sales thresholds to be eligible for the incentive.

schemes.application_mode: Online via designated government portal

schemes.name: PLI Scheme for Promoting Domestic Manufacturing of Medical Devices
schemes.target_audience: Domestic manufacturers of high-end medical devices
schemes.description: A scheme to promote the indigenous manufacturing of high-end medical devices to reduce import dependency and enhance national healthcare security.
schemes.benefits: Provides a financial incentive on incremental sales of medical devices manufactured in India, covering specific target segments like cancer care, radiology, and anesthetics.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must be greenfield projects and meet minimum incremental sales thresholds for specified high-end medical devices to qualify for incentives.

schemes.application_mode: Online via Department of Pharmaceuticals portal

schemes.name: PLI Scheme 2.0 for IT Hardware
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of IT hardware such as laptops, tablets, all-in-one PCs, and servers
schemes.description: An enhanced scheme to boost domestic manufacturing and exports in the IT hardware sector, building on the initial PLI scheme.
schemes.benefits: Provides an incentive on net incremental sales over the base year for a period of six years to encourage local production and value addition.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must meet specified thresholds for net incremental sales and investment to be eligible for the scheme.

schemes.application_mode: Online via Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) portal

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Gram Panchayat Development Grants
schemes.target_audience: Gram Panchayats in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A scheme providing significantly increased direct financial assistance to Gram Panchayats for strengthening grassroots governance, improving basic infrastructure like sanitation, and enhancing service delivery in villages, with an allocation of Rs 13,490.19 crore for 2026.
schemes.benefits: Direct financial grants to Gram Panchayats for local development projects, infrastructure improvement, and better service delivery.
required_docs: Utilization Certificate for previously received grants

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to all Gram Panchayats in Uttar Pradesh for undertaking development works as per approved plans.

schemes.application_mode: Through the Panchayati Raj Department, Government of Uttar Pradesh

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Multipurpose Panchayat Bhawan Nirman Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Gram Panchayats lacking adequate office and community infrastructure.
schemes.description: A scheme with an allocation of Rs 57 crore for the construction of 1,000 multipurpose panchayat buildings to serve as a hub for local governance and community services.
schemes.benefits: Funding for the construction of a multipurpose building to house the panchayat office, common service centers, and other community facilities.

eligibility_rules.description: Gram Panchayats identified by the state government based on the need for permanent infrastructure.

schemes.application_mode: Proposal submission through the District Panchayati Raj Officer (DPRO)

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Panchayat Utsav Bhawan Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Rural communities in every Assembly constituency of Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A scheme with a proposed budget of Rs 100 crore to build Panchayat Utsav Bhawans or 'Baraat Ghars' (community halls) in rural areas to provide a venue for social and public functions.
schemes.benefits: Construction of a community hall for social gatherings, functions, and public events in rural areas.

eligibility_rules.description: One Utsav Bhawan is to be constructed in a rural area of every Assembly constituency in the state.

schemes.application_mode: Through local MLA recommendation and the Panchayati Raj Department

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Gramin) - Uttar Pradesh
schemes.target_audience: Rural households and communities in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A centrally sponsored scheme with stepped-up state spending to improve sanitation and cleanliness in rural areas, aiming to make villages Open Defecation Free (ODF+) and manage solid and liquid waste effectively.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for the construction of individual household latrines (IHHLs), community sanitary complexes, and implementation of solid and liquid waste management projects.

eligibility_rules.description: Rural households without access to a toilet, and Gram Panchayats for community-level waste management projects.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal or through the Gram Panchayat

schemes.name: National Gram Swaraj Abhiyan - Uttar Pradesh
schemes.target_audience: Elected representatives and functionaries of Panchayati Raj Institutions (PRIs).
schemes.description: A centrally sponsored scheme with increased state focus aimed at strengthening the capacities of Panchayati Raj Institutions to govern, prepare participatory development plans, and deliver services effectively.
schemes.benefits: Provides training, capacity building, and technical assistance to Gram Panchayats to improve governance and participatory planning.

eligibility_rules.description: All three tiers of Panchayati Raj Institutions (Gram, Block, and District Panchayats) in Uttar Pradesh are eligible.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the State Panchayati Raj Department

schemes.name: Uttar Pradesh Agricultural Development Fund
schemes.target_audience: Farmers, dairy producers, and fishery entrepreneurs in Uttar Pradesh.
schemes.description: A comprehensive fund of Rs 10,888 crore allocated in the 2026 budget to boost farmer income through various interventions like price support for sugarcane and paddy, promotion of solar pumps, and development of dairy and fishery sectors.
schemes.benefits: Includes Minimum Support Price (MSP) for crops, subsidies on agricultural equipment like solar pumps, and support for allied sectors.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers and agricultural entrepreneurs residing in Uttar Pradesh. Specific sub-schemes under this fund may have additional criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Through the state Agriculture Department and its various online portals

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (Uttar Pradesh)
schemes.target_audience: Homeless rural families and those living in dilapidated (kutcha) houses.
schemes.description: A central housing scheme providing financial assistance to eligible rural beneficiaries for the construction of a pucca (permanent) house with basic amenities.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of Rs 1.2 lakh in plain areas, transferred in installments linked to construction stages. Optional home loan of up to Rs 70,000 with interest subsidy is also available.
required_docs: Proof of not owning a pucca house

eligibility_rules.description: Beneficiaries are identified from the Socio-Economic and Caste Census (SECC) 2011 data and subsequent Awas+ surveys. The family must not own a pucca house anywhere in India.

schemes.application_mode: Beneficiary identification through Gram Sabha and online registration by government officials.

schemes.name: National Handloom and Handicraft Programme
schemes.target_audience: Handloom weavers and handicraft artisans in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: An integrated national programme to strengthen existing schemes, providing targeted and effective support to weavers and artisans, improving incomes, ensuring market linkages, and preserving India’s rich textile heritage.
schemes.benefits: Provides targeted support, improves income, ensures market linkages, and offers financial assistance for the promotion of natural dyes and the establishment of dye houses.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered handloom weaver or handicraft artisan.

schemes.application_mode: Online via national portal and offline through district offices.

schemes.name: Tex-Eco Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Textile and apparel manufacturing units in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: Promotes globally competitive and environmentally sustainable textiles and apparel manufacturing. It supports a wide range of fibres to reduce import dependence and encourage innovation.
schemes.benefits: Support for sustainable production, strengthening domestic fibre availability, encouraging innovation in advanced textile materials, and reducing import dependence.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to textile and apparel manufacturing businesses focusing on sustainable practices and fibre diversification.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal for textile ministry schemes.

schemes.name: Textile Expansion and Employment Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Traditional textile clusters and units in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: Focuses on the modernisation of traditional textile clusters by providing capital support for machinery, technology upgradation, and the establishment of common testing and certification centres.
schemes.benefits: Capital support for machinery and technology upgrades, establishment of common testing facilities, enhanced productivity, improved quality compliance, and large-scale employment generation.

eligibility_rules.description: Available for traditional textile clusters and units seeking modernization and technology upgradation.

schemes.application_mode: Submission of proposals through designated state or central agencies.

schemes.name: National Fiber Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Farmers and producers of natural and new-age fibres in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: An integrated programme component designed to enhance the availability and quality of domestic natural fibres like silk, wool, and jute, as well as new-age fibres.
schemes.benefits: Strengthens domestic fibre availability, promotes diversification beyond cotton, and supports innovation in fibre production.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to farmers and producers involved in the cultivation or development of specified natural and new-age textile fibres.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the relevant agricultural or textile ministry portal.

schemes.name: SAMARTH 2.0
schemes.target_audience: Youth, artisans, and workers in the textile sector in Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A scheme to modernise skilling in the textile sector through strong industry-academia collaboration, building a workforce with capabilities aligned with modern manufacturing.
schemes.benefits: Provides modern skills training, enhances workforce capabilities, and improves employability in the textile industry through collaboration with industry partners.

eligibility_rules.description: Individuals seeking to upgrade their skills or get trained for employment in the modern textile manufacturing sector.

schemes.application_mode: Registration through designated training centres and online portals.

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi Gram Swaraj Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Khadi, handloom, and craft artisans and institutions in rural Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: Aims to strengthen khadi, handloom, and crafts by improving their branding and creating linkages to global markets.
schemes.benefits: Improved branding for traditional crafts, enhanced access to global markets, and strengthening of the rural artisan economy.

eligibility_rules.description: Artisans and institutions involved in the production of khadi, handloom, and other traditional crafts.

schemes.application_mode: Through Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC) and state-level handloom/handicraft corporations.

schemes.name: MSME Growth Fund for Textiles
schemes.target_audience: Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in the textile sector of Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A fund designed to provide financial incentives to textile MSMEs to improve governance, scalability, and export readiness.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives, support for scaling up operations, and assistance in becoming export-ready.

eligibility_rules.description: Registered MSMEs in the textile sector with a clear plan for growth, scalability, and exports.

schemes.application_mode: Online application through the MSME portal with a detailed project and growth plan.

schemes.name: Madhya Pradesh Startup Policy 2025
schemes.target_audience: New entrepreneurs and startups established in Madhya Pradesh, with special incentives for women-led and SC/ST/OBC startups.
schemes.description: A comprehensive policy by the MSME Department, Govt. of MP, to foster a resilient startup ecosystem through financial assistance, infrastructural support, and targeted incentives for capital efficiency and scale.
schemes.benefits: Provides a framework of schemes including grants for incubators, additional assistance for women entrepreneurs, and overall support to de-risk early-stage ventures.
required_docs: Application Form via MP Startup Portal

eligibility_rules.description: Startups must be established and operating in Madhya Pradesh and comply with the conditions outlined in the policy.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Madhya Pradesh Startup Portal

schemes.name: Capital Grant for Incubators under MP Startup Policy
schemes.target_audience: Entities setting up business incubators, including Technology Business Incubators (TBI) and Livelihood Business Incubators (LBI) in tribal districts.
schemes.description: A financial grant to support the establishment of new incubators to foster the startup ecosystem in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.benefits: One-time capital grant of up to 50% or INR 1 Crore for setting up an incubator. Includes a top-up grant up to INR 50 lakhs for TBIs and a grant up to INR 100 lakhs for LBIs in tribal districts.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a new incubator being established in Madhya Pradesh. Specific conditions apply for TBI and LBI grants.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Madhya Pradesh Startup Portal

schemes.name: Operational Expenses Grant for Incubators
schemes.target_audience: Operational business incubators in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: Provides financial support for the recurring operational expenses of incubators to ensure their sustainability and support for startups.
schemes.benefits: Grant for operational expenses up to a maximum of INR 10 Lakhs per year for 3 years, based on utilized seat capacity. Also includes 100% reimbursement of Stamp duty & registration fee on purchase/lease of space.

eligibility_rules.description: Grant amount is linked to the utilized seat capacity, ranging from 30% to 100%.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Madhya Pradesh Startup Portal

schemes.name: Additional Assistance for Women-Led Startups
schemes.target_audience: Startups set up by women entrepreneurs in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A special incentive under the MP Startup Policy to encourage and support women's participation in the startup ecosystem.
schemes.benefits: Provides an additional 20% financial assistance on top of the regular benefits available to startups under the policy.

eligibility_rules.description: The startup must be recognized as women-led as per the policy guidelines.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Madhya Pradesh Startup Portal

schemes.name: Madhya Pradesh Space Tech Policy 2026
schemes.target_audience: Startups, MSMEs, and industries involved in space-related applications.
schemes.description: A policy to promote and support the development of space technology and its applications in sectors like agriculture, disaster management, water resources, and urban planning within the state.
schemes.benefits: Financial, infrastructural, and research assistance for developing space-based applications.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a startup, MSME, or industry working on space-based applications relevant to the specified sectors.

schemes.application_mode: To be applied through the designated state department portal

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
schemes.target_audience: Non-corporate, non-farm small and micro enterprises across India, including Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A national scheme to provide loans up to ₹10 lakh to small and micro enterprises, categorized as Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun loans.
schemes.benefits: Collateral-free loans from banks, MFIs, and NBFCs to fund business activities in manufacturing, trading, and services sectors.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be an Indian citizen with a viable business plan for a non-farm income-generating activity.

schemes.application_mode: Directly through Banks, MFIs, or NBFCs

schemes.name: Madhya Pradesh MSME Award for Women Entrepreneurs
schemes.target_audience: Women entrepreneurs running Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: An annual award by the Department of MSME, Govt. of MP, to recognize and honor the significant contributions of women entrepreneurs to the state's MSME sector.
schemes.benefits: A special award money of Rs. 50,000 and a certificate of recognition.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a woman entrepreneur who has demonstrated efficient work culture and best practices in her MSME based in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Through nomination via the Department of MSME, Government of Madhya Pradesh

schemes.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.target_audience: Landholding farmer families
schemes.description: A central sector scheme operational since December 2018 to provide income support to all landholding farmer families across the country, including Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.benefits: Income support of Rs 6,000 per year is given to landholding farmer families in three equal instalments.

eligibility_rules.description: All landholding farmer families are eligible for the scheme.

schemes.application_mode: Online via official government portal

schemes.name: Namo Drone Didi Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Women self-help groups (SHGs)
schemes.description: Launched in November 2024, this scheme aims to empower women by providing drones to self-help groups, which can be rented to farmers for agricultural purposes like crop monitoring and spraying pesticides.
schemes.benefits: A subsidy is provided up to 80% of the cost of a drone.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered women self-help group.

schemes.application_mode: Through designated government channels

schemes.name: Sub-Mission On Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM)
schemes.target_audience: Farmers, Custom Hiring Centres (CHCs), and Farm Machinery Banks (FMBs)
schemes.description: This scheme provides financial support for the acquisition of farm machinery to increase mechanization. It also supports the establishment of Custom Hiring Centres and hubs for high-value equipment.
schemes.benefits: Financial subsidies to purchase a wide range of agricultural tools and machinery such as tractors, power tillers, sprayers, seed drills, and harvesters.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligible farmers and entities must complete registration and application through official government portals.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the central SMAM digital portal (agrimachinery.nic.in) or the state agriculture department's portal.

schemes.name: Kisan Kalyan Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A welfare scheme initiated by the Government of Madhya Pradesh aimed at improving the livelihoods of farmers by providing financial assistance, subsidies, and access to modern agricultural technologies.
schemes.benefits: Includes direct benefit transfer (DBT) of financial assistance, subsidies on inputs like seeds and fertilizers, crop insurance coverage, and facilitation of market linkages.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers registered under the scheme in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Simplified online or offline registration process.

schemes.name: Fal Podharopan Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in Madhya Pradesh with an interest in fruit cultivation.
schemes.description: A scheme by the Horticulture and Food Processing Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, to support farmers in establishing fruit orchards.
schemes.benefits: Provides a subsidy of 40% to 50% of the unit cost for planting fruit saplings, disbursed over three years. Covers fruits like mango, guava, orange, pomegranate, and banana.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers in Madhya Pradesh with private land ranging from 0.25 to 4 hectares and adequate irrigation facilities.

schemes.application_mode: Online application via the state horticulture department portal.

schemes.name: Annapurna Scheme: Seed Multiplication Programme
schemes.target_audience: Scheduled Caste (SC) and Scheduled Tribe (ST) small and marginal farmers.
schemes.description: A component of the Annapurna Scheme by the Department of Farmers Welfare and Agricultural Development, Government of Madhya Pradesh. It aims to improve the economic status of SC/ST farmers by providing them with economic assistance to access improved seeds of high-yielding foodgrain crops.
schemes.benefits: Economic assistance and subsidies to access improved, high-yielding seeds to increase crop productivity and production.
required_docs: Proof of Land Ownership (as small/marginal farmer)

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a small or marginal farmer belonging to the Scheduled Caste or Scheduled Tribe communities in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Applications are accepted by the Rural Agriculture Extension Officer based on set targets.

schemes.name: Crop Insurance Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Farmers
schemes.description: A scheme to provide insurance coverage and financial support to farmers in the event of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial compensation in the event of crop failure due to adverse weather conditions or other specified risks, ensuring income stability for farmers.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas are eligible for coverage.

schemes.application_mode: Through banks, agricultural societies, or designated online portals.

schemes.name: Ladli Behna Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Economically disadvantaged women in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A flagship scheme of the Madhya Pradesh government aimed at providing financial assistance to women to foster their economic independence, improve their health and nutrition status, and empower them.
schemes.benefits: Eligible women receive a monthly financial allowance of ₹1,250.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a married, widowed, divorced, or abandoned woman between the ages of 21 and 60, and a resident of Madhya Pradesh. The family's annual income should be less than ₹2.5 lakh, and they should not own more than 5 acres of land. No family member should be an income taxpayer.

schemes.application_mode: Online through designated portals and offline at Gram Panchayat/Ward offices.

schemes.name: Ladli Laxmi Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Girl children born in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A state government initiative to improve the future of girl children by linking financial assistance to their education and health, and to foster a positive mindset towards the birth of a girl child.
schemes.benefits: Financial assurance certificates are issued in the name of the girl child, with funds disbursed at various educational milestones and a final lump sum amount upon reaching the age of 21, provided she is not married before 18.
required_docs: Birth Certificate of the girl child
Proof of Residence in Madhya Pradesh
Family Planning Certificate (for the second girl child)

eligibility_rules.description: The girl child must be born on or after January 1, 2006. The parents must be residents of Madhya Pradesh and should not be income taxpayers. The benefit is limited to two daughters per family, with exceptions for twins.

schemes.application_mode: Online application through the official portal or via Anganwadi centers.

schemes.name: Mission Parivar Vikas (MPV)
schemes.target_audience: Women and families in high-fertility districts
schemes.description: A national mission focused on expanding access to family planning services and contraceptives in 146 high-fertility districts across seven states, including Madhya Pradesh, to improve maternal and child health outcomes.
schemes.benefits: Provides free access to a wider range of contraceptive methods, counseling services, and ensures commodity security. This empowers women, reduces maternal and infant mortality, and helps in population stabilization.
required_docs: Proof of Residence in a designated district

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme targets residents of 146 identified high-fertility districts across seven states, including Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Services are delivered through public healthcare facilities, community health workers (ASHA), and outreach camps.
schemes.state_applicability: Madhya Pradesh (in designated districts), Bihar, Uttar Pradesh, Assam, Chhattisgarh, Rajasthan, and Jharkhand

schemes.name: Saksham Anganwadi and Poshan 2.0
schemes.target_audience: Children under 6, pregnant women, and lactating mothers
schemes.description: An integrated nutrition support program that combines services of the Anganwadi Services, Poshan Abhiyan, and Scheme for Adolescent Girls. It aims to address malnutrition through a life-cycle approach, as indicated by the mention of immunization services at Anganwadi Centers.
schemes.benefits: Provides a package of six services: Supplementary Nutrition, Pre-school Non-formal Education, Nutrition & Health Education, Immunization, Health Check-up, and Referral Services.
required_docs: Aadhaar Card of mother and child

eligibility_rules.description: All children below 6 years of age, pregnant women, and lactating mothers residing in the service area of an Anganwadi Center are eligible.

schemes.application_mode: Registration at the local Anganwadi Center.

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
schemes.target_audience: Pregnant women from economically weaker sections
schemes.description: A centrally sponsored scheme under the National Health Mission aimed at reducing maternal and neonatal mortality by promoting institutional delivery. The text's focus on improving 'maternal and newborn health' implies the active implementation of this core scheme.
schemes.benefits: Provides cash assistance to eligible pregnant women for delivery and post-delivery care when they give birth in a government or accredited private health facility. Also includes assistance for ASHA workers.

eligibility_rules.description: All pregnant women from BPL/SC/ST households delivering in a health institution. In Low Performing States like Madhya Pradesh, the benefit is extended to all pregnant women delivering in institutions.

schemes.application_mode: Registration with a local ASHA or Anganwadi worker during pregnancy.

schemes.name: Overseas Employment Placement Scheme for OBC Youth 2025
schemes.target_audience: Unemployed youth from Other Backward Class (OBC) in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A revised scheme to facilitate foreign employment opportunities for OBC youth, aligning with global labor market requirements. It aims to enhance global employability and income opportunities.
schemes.benefits: Facilitates foreign employment for 600 OBC youth annually. Includes skill-based overseas placements, necessary training, and facilitation support. An allocation of Rs 45 crore has been approved for three years.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be an unemployed youth belonging to the Other Backward Class (OBC) category and a resident of Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online via state government portal (details to be announced).

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kaushal Samvardhan Yojana (MMKSY)
schemes.target_audience: Youth in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: Aims at raising the skilling quotient of the youth in the State by providing access to short term demand driven training courses in employable trades.
schemes.benefits: Provides free, short-term, demand-driven skill development training to enhance employability.
required_docs: Proof of Residence in Madhya Pradesh

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a youth and a resident of Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Department of Technical Education, Skill Development and Employment portal.

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
schemes.target_audience: Rural youth
schemes.description: A national scheme implemented by the Department of Rural Development for the skill training needs of candidates from rural backgrounds to provide them with jobs in the private sector.
schemes.benefits: Provides demand-led skill training at no cost to rural youth, with a focus on placements.

eligibility_rules.description: Primarily for youth from rural backgrounds across India, including Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration and through local mobilization by training partners.

schemes.name: Rural Self Employment Training Institutes (RSETI)
schemes.target_audience: Rural youth aspiring for self-employment.
schemes.description: A program to provide skill training and entrepreneurship development programs to rural youth, enabling them to start their own businesses.
schemes.benefits: Offers free residential training in various trades, entrepreneurship guidance, and support for securing bank loans.

eligibility_rules.description: Aimed at youth from rural backgrounds who are interested in self-employment.

schemes.application_mode: Application through local RSETI centers in the district.

schemes.name: PM JANMAN - Skill and Entrepreneurship Development
schemes.target_audience: Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs)
schemes.description: A component of the PM JANMAN scheme, implemented by MSDE, for the upliftment of Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs) through skilling and entrepreneurship.
schemes.benefits: Facilitates skill and entrepreneurship development in Van Dhan Vikas Kendras (VDVKs). As of Jan 2026, 38,386 beneficiaries have been trained under its Entrepreneurship Development Programme (EDP).

eligibility_rules.description: Must belong to a community identified as a Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Group (PVTG).

schemes.application_mode: Through designated government agencies and institutes like NIESBUD and IIE.

schemes.name: Skill and Entrepreneurship Development in Van Dhan Vikas Kendras (VDVKs)
schemes.target_audience: Tribal beneficiaries and members of Self-Help Groups (SHGs)
schemes.description: A key intervention focusing on facilitating skill and entrepreneurship development within Van Dhan Vikas Kendras to promote value addition to minor forest produce and other local resources.
schemes.benefits: Provides Entrepreneurship Development Programme (EDP) training and operational support for VDVKs to enhance the livelihood of tribal communities.
required_docs: Membership proof of a Self-Help Group (SHG) associated with a VDVK

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a tribal beneficiary associated with an operational Van Dhan Vikas Kendra.
