schemes.application_mode: Through TRIFED and state implementing agencies.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) - PMAY-U
schemes.target_audience: Urban poor families, including slum dwellers
schemes.description: A national scheme to provide affordable 'pucca' houses to the urban poor. Madhya Pradesh is a leading state in its implementation, with 8.77 lakh houses already constructed and a target of 10 lakh new homes.
schemes.benefits: Provides central assistance of Rs. 1 lakh per house for slum redevelopment and offers interest subsidies on home loans through the Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS).
required_docs: Affidavit stating the applicant does not own a pucca house

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must belong to Economically Weaker Section (EWS), Low Income Group (LIG), or Middle Income Group (MIG) and must not own a pucca house in any part of India.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the official PMAY-U portal or via Common Service Centers (CSCs).

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Rural)
schemes.target_audience: Rural households in Madhya Pradesh lacking sanitation facilities.
schemes.description: Aims to improve sanitation and hygiene in rural areas. The 2026-27 budget allocates Rs 400 crore for the construction of 2 lakh new family toilets in villages across the state.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for the construction of individual household toilets to make villages Open Defecation Free (ODF).

eligibility_rules.description: Rural families who do not have a toilet in their household are eligible for the scheme.

schemes.application_mode: Application through the Gram Panchayat or designated local government officials.

schemes.name: PM e-Bus Seva
schemes.target_audience: Urban commuters in major cities of Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A scheme to promote green urban mobility by deploying electric buses in cities. 972 e-buses were approved for Madhya Pradesh, with 472 already operating in key cities.
schemes.benefits: Provides modern, eco-friendly, and affordable public transport, helping to reduce air pollution and traffic congestion in urban areas.

eligibility_rules.description: This is an infrastructure development scheme implemented by city and state transport authorities, not for individual application.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) and state transport departments.

schemes.name: Shraddha Nagar Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Residents of urban wards across Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A new scheme introduced in the 2026-27 budget with a Rs 5,000 crore investment target over 3 years for developing infrastructure at the ward level.
schemes.benefits: Funding for ward-level infrastructure projects such as road repairs, drainage systems, and improvement of other basic services.

eligibility_rules.description: Projects are identified and executed by Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) based on local needs.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by municipal corporations and councils.

schemes.name: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation (AMRUT) 2.0
schemes.target_audience: Residents of all statutory towns in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A central mission to ensure universal coverage of water supply and substantial improvement in sewerage and septage management in urban areas. The state budget has allocated Rs 3,467 crore for this.
schemes.benefits: Development of urban infrastructure focusing on water supply, sewage networks, drainage, green spaces, and non-motorized urban transport.

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme is implemented by the state government and Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) through State Annual Action Plans (SAAPs).

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by state government and municipal bodies.

schemes.name: Urban Street Vendor Interest-Free Loan Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Urban street vendors in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A financial support initiative for urban street vendors. The state government has extended Rs 408 crore in interest-free loans to 1.79 lakh vendors.
schemes.benefits: Provision of collateral-free and interest-free working capital loans to help street vendors sustain and grow their businesses.
required_docs: Vending Certificate or ID card issued by ULB

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be an identified street vendor operating within the limits of an Urban Local Body (ULB).

schemes.application_mode: Online portal or through designated offices of Urban Local Bodies (ULBs).

schemes.name: Integrated Township Policy 2025
schemes.target_audience: Real estate developers and urban homebuyers.
schemes.description: A policy framework being implemented to support the development of sustainable, planned, and green urban townships in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.benefits: Promotes planned urban development, ensuring better infrastructure, green spaces, and organized housing, leading to improved quality of life for residents.

eligibility_rules.description: This is a policy framework for developers and urban planning authorities, not a direct benefit scheme for individuals.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented through state urban development and housing departments.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized sector workers, including gig and platform workers.
schemes.description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme launched in February 2019 to provide old age protection and social security to unorganized sector workers.
schemes.benefits: Assured monthly pension of Rs. 3000 after attaining the age of 60. Beneficiaries contribute a monthly amount between Rs. 55 and Rs. 200, with an equal matching contribution from the Central Government.

eligibility_rules.description: Workers in the age group of 18 to 40 years with a monthly income of Rs. 15,000 or less, who are not members of EPFO/ESIC/NPS (government funded).

schemes.application_mode: Enrolment through Common Service Centres (CSCs) or the official Maan-dhan portal.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
schemes.target_audience: Elderly persons from households below the poverty line (BPL).
schemes.description: A sub-scheme of the National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) that provides a monthly pension to the elderly from BPL households.
schemes.benefits: Central government provides a pension of INR 200 per month for beneficiaries aged 60-79 years and INR 500 for beneficiaries aged 80 and above. States, including Madhya Pradesh, are encouraged to provide an equal or higher sum.

eligibility_rules.description: Beneficiaries must belong to a Below Poverty Line (BPL) household and meet the age criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Through state/UT government social welfare departments.

schemes.name: eShram Portal
schemes.target_audience: All unorganized workers, including gig, platform, and migrant workers.
schemes.description: A centralized national database of unorganized workers to provide them with a Universal Account Number (UAN) and integrate various social security schemes on a single platform.
schemes.benefits: Provides a UAN for portability of social security benefits. Enables workers to access and track benefits from integrated schemes like PM-SYM, PMSBY, PMJJBY, and others. Supports migrant workforce mobility.

eligibility_rules.description: Any unorganized worker aged 16-59 can register on a self-declaration basis. Should not be a member of EPFO/ESIC.

schemes.application_mode: Self-registration on the eShram portal or through Common Service Centres (CSCs).

schemes.name: Annapurna Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Destitute elderly persons who are eligible for but not receiving a pension under IGNOAPS.
schemes.description: A scheme under the National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) that provides food security to destitute senior citizens.
schemes.benefits: Provides 10kg of free food grains per month to the beneficiary.

eligibility_rules.description: Elderly persons aged 65 or above who, though eligible for the National Old Age Pension Scheme (NOAPS), are not receiving the pension.

schemes.application_mode: Through state/UT government social welfare or food and civil supplies departments.

schemes.name: National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS)
schemes.target_audience: Households below the poverty line (BPL) that have lost their primary breadwinner.
schemes.description: A sub-scheme of the National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) providing one-time lump sum financial assistance to bereaved households.
schemes.benefits: A one-time lump sum financial assistance is provided to the bereaved household after the death of the primary breadwinner.
required_docs: Death Certificate of the primary breadwinner
Bank Account Details of the surviving family member

eligibility_rules.description: The deceased primary breadwinner must be aged between 18 and 59 years, and the family must be identified as being below the poverty line.

schemes.application_mode: Through state/UT government social welfare departments.

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.target_audience: Entrepreneurs and tech startups in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A national initiative to foster a strong ecosystem for innovation and startups, aiming to drive economic growth and create employment opportunities. It is actively promoted in states like Madhya Pradesh to attract tech investments.
schemes.benefits: Provides access to funding, tax exemptions, intellectual property rights facilitation, and networking opportunities with investors and mentors.

eligibility_rules.description: An entity is considered a Startup if it is incorporated as a private limited company, partnership firm, or LLP, and is working towards innovation, development, or improvement of products, processes, or services.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Startup India portal

schemes.name: DigiLocker
schemes.target_audience: All citizens of Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A flagship initiative under the Digital India program, providing a secure cloud-based platform for citizens to store, share, and verify official documents and certificates digitally.
schemes.benefits: Offers a digital wallet to access authentic documents like Aadhaar, driving license, and educational certificates, eliminating the need for physical copies.
required_docs: Aadhaar Card (for account creation and verification)

eligibility_rules.description: Any Indian citizen with a valid Aadhaar number can create and use a DigiLocker account.

schemes.application_mode: Online via website and mobile application

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM)
schemes.target_audience: Citizens, hospitals, clinics, and healthcare professionals in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: Aims to create an integrated digital health infrastructure for the country, connecting patients and healthcare providers to enable seamless access to health records.
schemes.benefits: Provides a unique Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA) number for each citizen, allowing them to link, view, and share their health records with consent, improving healthcare delivery.
required_docs: Aadhaar Card or other government-issued photo ID

eligibility_rules.description: All Indian citizens are eligible to create an ABHA number and participate in the digital health ecosystem.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration via ABDM portal or authorized healthcare facilities

schemes.name: MeitY Startup Hub (MSH)
schemes.target_audience: Technology startups in the IT and electronics sector in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A national platform by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) to connect the tech startup ecosystem, including incubators, accelerators, and investors, to foster innovation.
schemes.benefits: Offers startups access to mentorship, funding opportunities, participation in national challenges, and collaboration with industry and academia.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to technology startups working in emerging areas such as AI, IoT, Blockchain, Cybersecurity, and SaaS.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the MSH portal

schemes.name: Digital India Bhashini
schemes.target_audience: Developers, AI startups, researchers, and citizens in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: An AI-led language translation platform designed to break down language barriers and increase the availability of digital content in Indian languages.
schemes.benefits: Provides open-source AI models and datasets for Indian languages, enabling developers and startups to build voice-based and local language solutions, thereby increasing digital inclusion.
required_docs: Varies based on the nature of participation (e.g., developer registration, startup application)

eligibility_rules.description: Open platform for individuals and organizations interested in contributing to or utilizing Indian language technologies.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Bhashini platform

schemes.name: Atal Innovation Mission (AIM)
schemes.target_audience: Schools, universities, and startups in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A flagship initiative by NITI Aayog to foster a culture of innovation and entrepreneurship. It supports programs like Atal Tinkering Labs (ATLs) in schools and Atal Incubation Centers (AICs) for startups.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial grants to establish innovation labs and incubation centers. Offers mentorship, networking, and a platform for young innovators and startups to develop their ideas.
required_docs: Detailed proposal for lab or incubation center

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility criteria are specific to each program under AIM. ATLs are for schools (Grade VI - XII), while AICs are for higher educational institutions and corporate entities.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the AIM portal

schemes.name: Future Skills Prime
schemes.target_audience: IT professionals, students, and job seekers in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A digital skilling initiative by MeitY and NASSCOM to upskill and reskill individuals in emerging technologies like AI, data analytics, cybersecurity, and cloud computing.
schemes.benefits: Offers access to subsidized, industry-aligned courses and certifications. Provides government incentives on course fees upon successful certification to enhance employability.
required_docs: Aadhaar Card or other proof of identity

eligibility_rules.description: Open to any Indian citizen who wants to build skills in emerging digital technologies for career growth.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration through the Future Skills Prime platform

schemes.name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Residential homeowners and apartment associations
schemes.description: A central government scheme providing financial assistance to households for installing rooftop solar systems to promote clean energy. The scheme is active until March 31, 2026.
schemes.benefits: Subsidy of ₹30,000 per kW for systems up to 2 kW, and an additional ₹18,000 per kW for systems between 2 to 3 kW. The total subsidy is capped at ₹78,000 for systems of 3 kW and above.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be an Indian citizen, own or have legal control over rooftop space, have a valid electricity connection from a DISCOM, and use MNRE-approved vendors. The scheme is not applicable for commercial or industrial consumers.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the National Subsidy Portal and Sandes App

schemes.name: PM-KUSUM Component-A: Decentralized Solar Power Plants
schemes.target_audience: Farmers, Farmer Producer Organisations (FPO), Cooperatives
schemes.description: This component of the PM-KUSUM scheme supports the setup of decentralized ground-mounted grid-connected solar power plants on barren or uncultivable land. The scheme is active until March 2026.
schemes.benefits: Farmers can generate income by selling surplus power to the grid from solar plants installed on their land.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers and related agricultural bodies are eligible to install solar plants on their land.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the designated state or central portal

schemes.name: PM-KUSUM Component-B: Stand-alone Solar Agriculture Pumps
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in off-grid areas
schemes.description: This component of the PM-KUSUM scheme aims to facilitate the installation of stand-alone solar-powered agriculture pumps in off-grid areas where grid supply is not available. The scheme is active until March 2026.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial assistance to farmers for installing new solar pumps, reducing their reliance on diesel and lowering irrigation costs.
required_docs: Proof of no existing electricity connection for the pump

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers in off-grid areas without access to grid electricity for their agricultural pumps are eligible.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the designated state or central portal

schemes.name: PM-KUSUM Component-C: Solarisation of Grid-Connected Agriculture Pumps
schemes.target_audience: Farmers with existing grid-connected pumps
schemes.description: This component of the PM-KUSUM scheme supports the solarisation of existing grid-connected agriculture pumps, allowing farmers to generate solar power for their irrigation needs. The scheme is active until March 2026.
schemes.benefits: Helps farmers reduce their electricity bills for irrigation. Any surplus solar power generated can be sold to the grid, providing an additional source of income.
required_docs: Existing electricity bill for the agricultural pump

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers who have an existing grid-connected agricultural pump are eligible for this component.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the designated state or central portal

schemes.name: Madhya Pradesh State Rooftop Solar Subsidy
schemes.target_audience: Residential solar buyers in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: A state-level initiative by the Government of Madhya Pradesh that works in conjunction with central government schemes to provide additional financial incentives for the adoption of residential rooftop solar systems.
schemes.benefits: Provides a state-specific subsidy that complements the central financial assistance, further reducing the upfront cost of solar panel installation for homeowners in Madhya Pradesh.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh and meet the eligibility criteria for the central government's rooftop solar scheme.

schemes.application_mode: Applied for concurrently with the central subsidy through the national portal.

schemes.name: Scheme of Assistance to Persons with Disabilities for Purchase/Fitting of Aids /Appliances (ADIP Scheme)
schemes.target_audience: Persons with disabilities requiring assistive devices.
schemes.description: A central government scheme implemented in states to assist needy persons with disabilities in procuring durable, modern aids and appliances to promote their physical, social, and psychological rehabilitation. It also covers corrective surgeries.
schemes.benefits: Provides wheelchairs, callipers, walking aids, orthopaedic devices, hearing aids, visual aids, prosthetics, and other assistive devices. Also covers the cost of pre-aid corrective surgeries.

eligibility_rules.description: Indian citizen with at least 40% disability, with a monthly income not exceeding a specified limit, and who has not received similar assistance in recent years.

schemes.application_mode: Through implementing agencies like ALIMCO, National Institutes, CRCs, and NGOs.

schemes.name: BADHTE KADAM – Awareness, Inclusion & Community Sensitisation Programme
schemes.target_audience: Persons with severe or multiple disabilities from BPL households.
schemes.description: A comprehensive scheme to promote social awareness, community interaction, and inclusion of PwDs. It provides a package of benefits including financial assistance, scholarships, and travel support.
schemes.benefits: Provides a package of benefits including marriage assistance, monthly maintenance grants, annual scholarships for students, free/subsidised public transport, and unemployment stipends.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must have a severe or multiple disability (80% or above), belong to a Below Poverty Line (BPL) household, and be between 18 to 79 years of age.

schemes.application_mode: Online/Offline through Social Justice and Disabled Welfare Department.

schemes.name: Divyang Shiksha Protsahan Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Students with disabilities.
schemes.description: Aims to promote and facilitate inclusive education for persons with disabilities (Divyangjan) by providing financial support for their studies.
schemes.benefits: Provides an annual scholarship, ranging from ₹3,000 to ₹8,000 or more, to ensure continuity in education for disabled students.
required_docs: Proof of Admission in an educational institution

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a student with a disability (typically 40% or more) enrolled in a recognized educational institution in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state scholarship portal or offline through the educational institution.

schemes.name: Divyangjan Marriage Assistance Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Persons with severe disabilities from BPL families who are getting married.
schemes.description: Provides a one-time financial grant to support disabled persons upon marriage, promoting their right to a dignified social and family life.
schemes.benefits: A one-time financial assistance amount (e.g., ₹30,000) is provided to the disabled person upon their marriage.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must have a severe or multiple disability (80% or above), belong to a BPL household, and be of legal marriageable age.

schemes.application_mode: Offline/Online through the Social Justice and Disabled Welfare Department.

schemes.name: Divyangjan Maintenance Grant Scheme (Disability Pension)
schemes.target_audience: Persons with severe or multiple disabilities aged 18-79 from BPL households.
schemes.description: Provides a monthly maintenance grant (pension) to individuals with severe disabilities to help them with their daily living expenses and ensure financial stability.
schemes.benefits: A monthly maintenance grant (e.g., ₹1,500) is provided directly to the beneficiary's bank account.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a person with a severe or multiple disability (80% or above), belong to a BPL household, and not be receiving any other pension.

schemes.application_mode: Online/Offline through local government bodies or the Social Justice Department.

schemes.name: Unemployment Stipend for Persons with Disabilities
schemes.target_audience: Unemployed persons with severe disabilities from BPL families.
schemes.description: Offers a small monthly stipend to support the basic needs of unemployed persons with disabilities while they seek work or training.
schemes.benefits: A monthly stipend, ranging from ₹400 to ₹1,000, is offered to support basic needs while seeking employment.
required_docs: Proof of Unemployment (e.g., Employment Exchange registration)

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be an unemployed person with a severe disability (typically 80% or more) and belong to a BPL household.

schemes.application_mode: Online/Offline through the District Employment Office or Social Justice Department.

schemes.name: MP TAAS Scholarship
schemes.target_audience: Students belonging to Scheduled Caste (SC), Scheduled Tribe (ST), and Other Backward Class (OBC) categories in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: An initiative by the Madhya Pradesh government, managed by the Tribal Affairs and Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, to provide financial assistance for post-matric (Class 11 and above) and higher education to students from underprivileged communities.
schemes.benefits: Financial aid ranging from ₹230 to ₹1500 per month, transferred directly to the student's bank account. Covers tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and other educational expenses.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh, belong to SC/ST/OBC categories, and be enrolled in a post-matric course (Class 11 onwards). Parents should not be employed in government service.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the MPTAAS (Madhya Pradesh Tribal Affairs Automation System) Portal.

schemes.name: Diet Grant Scheme for Tribal Communities
schemes.target_audience: Tribal communities in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A scheme providing financial grants for nutritional support to tribal communities, funded as part of a larger Tribal Affairs Department initiative continuing until 2030-31.
schemes.benefits: Financial grant for diet and nutritional purposes.

eligibility_rules.description: Must belong to a designated tribal community within Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Offline/Online through the Tribal Affairs Department.

schemes.name: Tribal Hostels and Schools Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Students from tribal communities in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A scheme focused on providing residential and educational facilities through dedicated hostels and schools for students from tribal communities, with funding approved until 2030-31.
schemes.benefits: Provision of accommodation in hostels and admission to specialized schools for tribal students.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a student belonging to a tribal community in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Through respective schools and the Tribal Affairs Department.

schemes.name: Housing Assistance Scheme for Tribal Communities
schemes.target_audience: Tribal community members in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: Provides financial assistance for housing to members of tribal communities, funded under the Tribal Affairs Department with continuity approved until 2030-31.
schemes.benefits: Financial aid for the construction or improvement of houses.
required_docs: Land ownership documents or proof of residence

eligibility_rules.description: Must belong to a tribal community in Madhya Pradesh and be in need of housing assistance.

schemes.application_mode: Through the Tribal Affairs Department.

schemes.name: Aawas Bhatta Sahaayata Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Poor students belonging to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe communities.
schemes.description: A scheme by the Government of Madhya Pradesh that provides housing allowance (bhatta) to financially weak students from SC and ST communities to support their education away from home.
schemes.benefits: Financial allowance for housing/rent for eligible students.
required_docs: Proof of Admission to an educational institution

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a financially weak student from the Scheduled Caste or Scheduled Tribe community in Madhya Pradesh pursuing education.

schemes.application_mode: Online, likely through the MPTAAS portal.

schemes.name: Madhya Pradesh Civil Service (Pension) Rules, 2026
schemes.target_audience: Retired Madhya Pradesh civil service employees and their families.
schemes.description: New, simplified pension rules effective in 2026 to streamline benefits, simplify procedures for commutation, and extend family pension eligibility to unmarried, widowed, and divorced daughters.
schemes.benefits: Simplified and timely disposal of pension cases and inclusion of unmarried, widowed, and divorced daughters as eligible for family pension.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable to retired Madhya Pradesh civil service employees and their eligible family members as defined under the new rules.

schemes.application_mode: Internal administrative process upon retirement.

schemes.name: Ladli Behna Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Eligible women residents of Madhya Pradesh, including those from SC, ST, and Tribal communities.
schemes.description: A flagship social welfare scheme of the Madhya Pradesh government providing a monthly financial allowance to eligible women to promote their economic independence, health, and well-being.
schemes.benefits: A monthly allowance of ₹1,250 transferred directly to the beneficiary's bank account.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a woman resident of Madhya Pradesh meeting the specific age, marital status, and income criteria set by the government.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal and designated application camps.

schemes.name: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar Kamdhenu Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Dairy farmers and milk cooperatives
schemes.description: A scheme aimed at expanding the dairy sector in Madhya Pradesh to increase the state's share in national milk production from 9% to 20% through the formation of new milk cooperatives and other support.
schemes.benefits: Support for institutionalizing dairy farming and the formation of over 1,200 new milk cooperatives.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligible applicants are dairy farmers and those looking to establish milk cooperatives within Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online via state portal or through local Animal Husbandry department offices.

schemes.name: Madhya Pradesh Integrated Fisheries Policy 2026
schemes.target_audience: Fishermen, entrepreneurs in the fisheries sector, and fishing communities
schemes.description: A comprehensive policy to attract investment of Rs 3,000 crore over three years to boost the fisheries sector, aiming to generate around 20,000 employment opportunities.
schemes.benefits: Installation of approximately one lakh modern cage culture units, promotion of eco-tourism, and development of green energy-linked livelihood models in the fisheries sector.

eligibility_rules.description: Individuals and entities involved in or planning to invest in the fisheries sector in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Through the Department of Fisheries, Government of Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.name: Rural Animal Healthcare Infrastructure Development Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Livestock owners and rural communities
schemes.description: A scheme with a sanctioned budget of Rs 610.51 crore for the period 2026-2031 to improve animal healthcare services in rural areas by developing infrastructure for veterinary hospitals and related buildings.
schemes.benefits: Financial allocation for the construction and upgradation of veterinary hospitals and other animal healthcare infrastructure in rural Madhya Pradesh.
required_docs: Not applicable for individuals, this is an infrastructure development scheme.

eligibility_rules.description: This is a government infrastructure project for rural areas in Madhya Pradesh. Benefits are for the community at large.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the state's Animal Husbandry department.

schemes.name: Chief Minister Fishermen Prosperity Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Fishermen and fishing communities
schemes.description: An extended scheme with a Rs 200 crore allocation for 2026-27 and 2027-28 to support the overall prosperity of the fishing community.
schemes.benefits: Support for fish seed development, skill development training, interest subsidies on loans, and employment generation activities.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered fisherman residing in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal or through the local fisheries department office.

schemes.name: Varla Micro Lift Irrigation Project
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in 33 villages of Barwani district
schemes.description: An irrigation project with a budget of Rs 860.53 crore designed to draw 51.42 MCM of water from the Narmada river to irrigate agricultural land.
schemes.benefits: Provides irrigation facilities to 15,500 hectares of land across 33 villages, improving crop yield and water security for farmers.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers owning agricultural land within the project's command area in the specified 33 villages of Barwani district.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the state irrigation department; farmers in the area are automatically included.

schemes.name: Pansemal Irrigation Project
schemes.target_audience: Farmers in 53 villages of Barwani district
schemes.description: A large-scale irrigation project with a budget of Rs 1,207.44 crore that will utilize 74.65 MCM of water to irrigate a vast agricultural area.
schemes.benefits: Provides irrigation to 22,500 hectares of land across 53 villages, significantly boosting agricultural productivity.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers who own agricultural land within the designated command area of the project across 53 villages in Barwani district.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the state irrigation department; farmers in the area are automatically included.

schemes.name: National Programme for Dairy Development (NPDD)
schemes.target_audience: Milk producers, dairy cooperatives, and producer-owned institutions
schemes.description: A central sector scheme to increase sales of milk and dairy products by improving farmers’ access to organized markets, upgrading dairy processing facilities, and enhancing the capacity of producer-owned institutions.
schemes.benefits: Financial and technical support for upgrading dairy processing and marketing infrastructure, thereby increasing returns to milk producers.
required_docs: Project proposal from a cooperative or producer institution

eligibility_rules.description: Producer-owned institutions, dairy cooperatives, and other eligible entities involved in the dairy sector.

schemes.application_mode: Proposals are submitted through the State Dairy Federation to the Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Government of India.

schemes.name: Export Promotion Mission (EPM) - Credit-Linked Schemes
schemes.target_audience: Exporters in India
schemes.description: Launched on January 2, 2026, these are two new credit-linked schemes under the Export Promotion Mission designed to ease and reduce the cost of credit access for exporters.
schemes.benefits: Provides easier and more affordable access to credit for exporters. The schemes have a total outlay of ₹5,181 crore over six years until 2030-31.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a registered exporter with a valid Import Export Code (IEC).

schemes.application_mode: Online Portal

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for White Goods (ACs and LED Lights)
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of Air Conditioners and LED Lights
schemes.description: A Production Linked Incentive scheme aimed at boosting domestic manufacturing capacity and increasing domestic value-addition for air conditioners and LED lights.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives on incremental sales of goods manufactured in India. The scheme has an outlay of ₹6,238 crore.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility is based on pre-defined criteria for investment and incremental sales of manufactured goods.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Large-Scale Electronics Manufacturing
schemes.target_audience: Companies involved in large-scale electronics manufacturing, including mobile phones and specified components.
schemes.description: This scheme aims to boost domestic manufacturing and attract significant investments in the electronics value chain.
schemes.benefits: Performance-linked financial incentives on incremental sales of electronic goods manufactured in India.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must meet the threshold criteria for incremental investment and sales of manufactured goods.

schemes.application_mode: Online Portal

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Automobiles and Auto Components
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of automobiles and auto components, focusing on advanced automotive technology.
schemes.description: Aims to enhance India's manufacturing capabilities in the automobile and auto component sector by promoting the production of advanced technology products.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial incentives based on the determined sales value of eligible advanced automotive technology products.

eligibility_rules.description: Companies must meet specified criteria related to investment and manufacturing of advanced automotive technology components.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of bulk drugs, medical devices, and pharmaceuticals.
schemes.description: Designed to promote domestic manufacturing of critical Key Starting Materials (KSMs), Drug Intermediates (DIs), Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs), and medical devices to reduce import dependency.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives on incremental sales of domestically manufactured pharmaceutical products and medical devices.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must be engaged in the manufacturing of specified pharmaceutical products or medical devices and meet investment and sales criteria.

schemes.application_mode: Online Portal

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Food Processing Industry
schemes.target_audience: Food manufacturing and processing entities.
schemes.description: A scheme to support the creation of global food manufacturing champions and to promote Indian food product brands in international markets.
schemes.benefits: Performance-linked incentives on incremental sales and expenditure on branding and marketing in foreign markets.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility is determined by the applicant's scale of operations and commitment to incremental sales and exports.

schemes.application_mode: Online

schemes.name: PLI Scheme for Non-Semiconductor Electronics Components
schemes.target_audience: Manufacturers of critical electronic components like multi-layer PCBs, display modules, camera modules, lithium-ion cells, resistors, capacitors, and inductors.
schemes.description: Approved in March 2025 with an outlay of ₹22,919 crore, this scheme aims to establish a robust domestic ecosystem for non-semiconductor electronic components.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives on incremental production over a six-year tenure to attract investment and boost domestic manufacturing.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must be manufacturers of the targeted electronic components and meet the scheme's investment and production thresholds.

schemes.application_mode: Online Portal

schemes.name: Chief Minister Majra-Tola Road Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Residents of remote hamlets (mazras and tolas), particularly tribal communities, without all-weather road connectivity.
schemes.description: A state government scheme with a budget of Rs 21,630 crore to construct approximately 30,900 km of all-weather roads, connecting 20,600 remote settlements to the main road network.
schemes.benefits: Provides all-weather road connectivity, improving access to essential services like healthcare, education, and markets.
required_docs: Not applicable for individual beneficiaries as this is an area-based infrastructure project.

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme targets remote mazras, tolas, and settlements identified by the Panchayat and Rural Development department as lacking proper road connectivity.

schemes.application_mode: Project identification and implementation is carried out by the state government.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G) in Madhya Pradesh
schemes.target_audience: Houseless households and those living in kutcha and dilapidated houses in rural areas of Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A centrally sponsored housing scheme implemented in Madhya Pradesh to provide financial assistance for the construction of a pucca (permanent) house with basic amenities to eligible rural families.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance to construct a durable house, promoting safe and dignified living.

eligibility_rules.description: Beneficiaries are identified from the Socio-Economic and Caste Census (SECC) 2011 data and the Awas+ survey list based on specific housing deprivation parameters.

schemes.application_mode: Beneficiaries are identified through Gram Sabhas based on the permanent waitlist. Direct applications are generally not solicited.

schemes.name: Village Panchayat Digital Library Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Students and residents of rural villages in Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: An initiative to establish digital libraries in village panchayats, equipping each with two computers and e-books, including the NCERT syllabus for classes 6-12, to foster digital literacy and education.
schemes.benefits: Free access to computers, digital educational content, and e-books for rural communities.
required_docs: Not applicable for individual beneficiaries; libraries are for community use.

eligibility_rules.description: The initiative is being implemented in a phased manner, starting with an initial 113 village panchayats selected by the state government.

schemes.application_mode: Government-led implementation at the Gram Panchayat level.

schemes.name: Amarkantak Thermal Power Plant Expansion Project
schemes.target_audience: General public and industries of Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description: A significant state infrastructure project to augment power generation capacity by establishing a new 660 MW unit at the Amarkantak Thermal Power Plant.
schemes.benefits: Enhances the state's electricity generation capacity, leading to a more stable and reliable power supply for residential and industrial consumers.

eligibility_rules.description: This is a state-level infrastructure development project executed by the government's power generation entity.

schemes.application_mode: Government project implemented by the state power utility.

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Traditional artisans and craftspeople
schemes.description: A central sector scheme to provide end-to-end support to artisans and craftspeople, nurturing their art and helping them grow and prosper. It connects artisans from different regions, including Madhya Pradesh, and skill sets.
schemes.benefits: Holistic support including skill upgradation, toolkit incentives, credit support, and market linkages to traditional artisans and craftspeople.
required_docs: Proof of being a traditional artisan

eligibility_rules.description: Traditional artisans and craftspeople from various trades and regions across India, including Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the official PM Vishwakarma portal

schemes.name: National Handloom and Handicraft Programme
schemes.target_audience: Handloom weavers and handicraft artisans
schemes.description: An integrated national programme that strengthens existing schemes to provide targeted support to weavers and artisans, improve incomes, ensure market linkages, and preserve India’s textile heritage.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance, improved market access, and support for infrastructure like dye houses.

eligibility_rules.description: Handloom weavers and handicraft artisans across the country.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal and through respective state directorates

schemes.name: Artisan Producer Company Formation Scheme (under NHDP)
schemes.target_audience: Groups of handicraft artisans and implementing agencies
schemes.description: An initiative under the National Handicrafts Development Programme (NHDP) to facilitate the formation of Artisan Producer Companies (PCs) in handicraft clusters, aiming to formalize the sector and create sustainable business models.
schemes.benefits: Support and facilitation for forming a Producer Company, enabling better market access, formalization, and organized business operations for member artisans.
required_docs: DC(H) empanelment Registration Certificate for Implementing Agency
Undertaking to mobilize at least 300 artisans
List of artisans with Pehchan ID

eligibility_rules.description: Proposals are invited from eligible Implementing Agencies (I.A.) empaneled with the O/o DC(H) that have worked in a craft cluster for at least 10 years and can mobilize a minimum of 300 artisans.

schemes.application_mode: Online submission through the MIS portal of the Office of the Development Commissioner (Handicrafts)

schemes.name: Tex-Eco Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Textile and apparel manufacturers
schemes.description: Promotes globally competitive and environmentally sustainable textiles and apparel (T&A) manufacturing. It supports a wide range of fibres, including natural, man-made, and new-age fibres, to reduce import dependence.
schemes.benefits: Support for using diverse and sustainable fibres, innovation in advanced textile materials, and promotion of environmentally friendly manufacturing.

eligibility_rules.description: Textile and apparel manufacturing units focusing on innovation, diversification of fibres, and sustainable practices.

schemes.application_mode: Through proposals to the Ministry of Textiles

schemes.name: Textile Expansion and Employment Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Traditional textile clusters and workers
schemes.description: Focused on the modernisation of traditional textile clusters, this scheme provides capital support for machinery, technology upgradation, and the establishment of common testing and certification centres.
schemes.benefits: Capital support for machinery, technology upgradation, and establishment of common facility centers to enhance productivity and generate large-scale employment.

eligibility_rules.description: Traditional textile clusters seeking modernization and technology upgradation.

schemes.application_mode: Submission of proposals to the relevant government body

schemes.name: Financial Assistance for Awardee Weavers
schemes.target_audience: Elderly award-winning handloom weavers and workers in indigent circumstances
schemes.description: A social welfare scheme providing monthly financial support to elderly, award-winning handloom weavers and workers who are in difficult financial situations.
schemes.benefits: Financial support of Rs. 8,000 per month.
required_docs: Income Certificate to prove indigent circumstances

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an awardee handloom weaver or worker in indigent circumstances.

schemes.application_mode: Application to the Office of the Development Commissioner (Handlooms)

schemes.name: Mega Cluster Development Programme
schemes.target_audience: Handloom and handicraft clusters
schemes.description: A component of the National Handloom and Handicraft Programme providing financial assistance for the promotion of natural and vegetable dyes and for the establishment of dye houses in clusters.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for establishing common infrastructure like dye houses and promoting the use of natural dyes within artisan clusters.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligible handloom and handicraft clusters identified for development.

schemes.application_mode: Through proposals submitted to the Ministry of Textiles

schemes.name: National Overseas Scholarship for SC/ST Students
schemes.target_audience: Students from Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) categories pursuing postgraduate and higher courses abroad.
schemes.description: A scholarship to support students from SC/ST communities to pursue higher education (Postgraduate and above) in premier institutions abroad, specifically those ranked in the Top 200 in QS/THE World University Rankings.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for tuition, living expenses, and other related costs for studying in a foreign country.
required_docs: Proof of Admission to foreign university
Previous Academic Records (with 75% marks or 7 CGPA)

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an Indian national from SC or ST category, pursuing PG or higher courses from top 200 QS/THE ranked universities abroad. Must have secured at least 7 CGPA or 75% marks in the previous academic year.

schemes.application_mode: Online via National Scholarships Portal

schemes.name: Scholarships offered by the Republic of Slovenia for the AY 2026-27
schemes.target_audience: Indian students seeking to pursue higher education in the Republic of Slovenia.
schemes.description: An external scholarship program offered by the Republic of Slovenia for Indian students for the academic year 2026-27. This is facilitated through the Ministry of Education, India, under its External Scholarships program.
schemes.benefits: Covers tuition fees and/or living expenses for studying in Slovenia. Specific details are provided in the official public notice.
required_docs: Letter of Acceptance from a Slovenian institution

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility criteria are set by the Government of the Republic of Slovenia and typically require confirmed admission to a recognized Slovenian higher education institution.

schemes.application_mode: Online via Ministry of Education portal or as directed in the public notice.

schemes.name: National Scholarships Scheme (Ministry of Education)
schemes.target_audience: Students across various levels of school and higher education in India.
schemes.description: A broad category of scholarships provided by the Government of India's Ministry of Education to support students financially at different stages of their education within the country. These are accessible via the National Scholarship Portal.
schemes.benefits: Varies by specific sub-scheme, but generally includes financial aid for tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and other educational expenses.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility varies widely depending on the specific scholarship under this umbrella. Common criteria include academic merit, financial need, and social category.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the National Scholarship Portal (NSP)

schemes.name: Schemes related to Education Loan
schemes.target_audience: Students seeking financial loans for higher education in India and abroad.
schemes.description: Government-backed schemes aimed at facilitating education loans for students through various financial institutions, often with benefits like interest subsidies or credit guarantees.
schemes.benefits: Access to education loans at subsidized interest rates, moratorium periods, and credit guarantees to pursue higher education without immediate financial burden.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be an Indian national who has secured admission to a recognized course in India or abroad. Specific criteria are set by the lending banks under the respective government scheme guidelines.

schemes.application_mode: Through designated banks and financial institutions

schemes.name: Rajasthan State Scholarship Portal Schemes
schemes.target_audience: Students who are residents of Rajasthan, studying within or outside the state.
schemes.description: A collection of scholarship schemes offered by the Government of Rajasthan for various student categories, managed through the state's dedicated scholarship portal. The portal was open for applications for the 2025-26 session.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for tuition fees, course fees, and maintenance allowance to eligible students.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a bonafide resident of Rajasthan. Other criteria related to income, caste, and academic performance vary depending on the specific scheme applied for.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the Rajasthan Scholarship Portal

schemes.name: iStart Rajasthan
schemes.target_audience: Startups, MSMEs, and student innovators in Rajasthan.
schemes.description: Flagship program by the Government of Rajasthan to foster innovation and entrepreneurship through funding, mentorship, incubation, and market access. It uses a 'QRate' system to evaluate and prioritize startups for benefits.
schemes.benefits: Holistic support including incubation at Bhamashah TechnoHub and iStart Nests, mentorship, networking, market access, and access to various funding mechanisms.
required_docs: Business Registration (Proprietorship, Partnership, LLP, or Pvt. Ltd.)

eligibility_rules.description: Startup must be a registered entity in Rajasthan, have an operating office in the state, or have founders from the state. Must have a unique, innovative, or tech-based idea and a Q-Rate score.

schemes.application_mode: Online via iStart Rajasthan Portal

schemes.name: iStart Rajasthan Sustenance Allowance
schemes.target_audience: Early-stage rural and urban startups in Rajasthan.
schemes.description: Provides a monthly stipend for up to one year to help early-stage startups cover their initial operational and living expenses.
schemes.benefits: Monthly allowance of ₹10,000 for rural startups and ₹25,000 for urban startups for up to 1 year.
required_docs: Proof of business operations in Rajasthan

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered startup under the iStart Rajasthan program and meet the criteria for early-stage support.

schemes.application_mode: Online via iStart Rajasthan Portal

schemes.name: iStart Rajasthan Seed Funding / Viability Grant
schemes.target_audience: Prototype and early-stage startups requiring initial capital.
schemes.description: Provides one-time capital support to help startups develop their prototype, build a minimum viable product (MVP), and begin early-stage operations.
schemes.benefits: One-time seed funding grant up to ₹25 Lakh.

eligibility_rules.description: Registered startup under iStart Rajasthan, typically at the idea, prototype, or early revenue stage. Funding is dependent on the startup's Q-Rate assessment.

schemes.application_mode: Online via iStart Rajasthan Portal

schemes.name: iStart Rajasthan Marketing & Commercialisation Grant
schemes.target_audience: Startups ready to go to market with their products or services.
schemes.description: Financial assistance to help startups with their marketing, branding, and commercialization efforts to reach a wider customer base.
schemes.benefits: Grant of up to ₹10 lakh for marketing and commercialization activities.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered startup under the iStart Rajasthan program with a market-ready product. The grant is awarded based on the Q-Rate score and a viable marketing plan.

schemes.application_mode: Online via iStart Rajasthan Portal

schemes.name: iStart Rajasthan Scale-up Fund
schemes.target_audience: Growth-stage startups seeking to scale their operations.
schemes.description: Provides financial support to growth-stage startups, often as convertible debt, to help them expand their business after they have secured external funding.
schemes.benefits: Financial support up to 50% of the amount raised by the startup, provided as debt convertible to a grant or equity.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a growth-stage startup registered under iStart Rajasthan that has already secured external funding. The fund is provided as convertible debt.

schemes.application_mode: Online via iStart Rajasthan Portal

schemes.name: iStart Rajasthan Startup Equity Fund
schemes.target_audience: Startups seeking equity investment.
schemes.description: A matching investment fund established as an Alternative Investment Fund (AIF) to co-invest in promising startups in Rajasthan, leveraging private capital.
schemes.benefits: Matching equity investment of up to ₹5 crore per startup.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligible startups registered under iStart that are raising an equity round from other investors. The fund provides matching investment.

schemes.application_mode: Through the iStart program and associated AIF managers

schemes.name: iStart Rajasthan Ideation Grant
schemes.target_audience: Pre-seed stage startups and innovators, with a special focus on women-led startups.
schemes.description: Provides initial funding to help innovators and entrepreneurs develop their ideas into a viable business concept or prototype.
schemes.benefits: Grant of up to ₹2.4 lakh for pre-seed stage startups, with an additional ₹60,000 for women-led startups.

eligibility_rules.description: Innovators and pre-seed stage startups registered with iStart Rajasthan. Women-led startups are eligible for additional funding.

schemes.application_mode: Online via iStart Rajasthan Portal

schemes.name: Rajasthan Farmer Support Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Wheat farmers in Rajasthan
schemes.description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to wheat farmers by offering a bonus over and above the Minimum Support Price (MSP) on wheat purchases.
schemes.benefits: Financial bonus paid to farmers over and above the declared MSP for wheat, aiming to increase their income.
required_docs: Crop sale receipt at MSP procurement center

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a registered farmer in Rajasthan cultivating and selling wheat through government procurement channels.

schemes.application_mode: Automatic benefit upon sale at MSP centers

schemes.name: Subsidy on Solar Pumps for Farmers
schemes.target_audience: Farmers requiring irrigation solutions
schemes.description: Provides financial subsidy to farmers for the installation of solar-powered irrigation pumps, promoting sustainable energy use and reducing dependency on the electricity grid. The 2026 budget aims to install 50,000 pumps.
schemes.benefits: Financial subsidy on the total cost of installing solar-powered water pumps for agricultural purposes.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a farmer in Rajasthan with a valid agricultural land holding and a verified water source.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state's agriculture department portal

schemes.name: Subsidy on Agricultural Equipment
schemes.target_audience: Farmers seeking to mechanize their farming operations
schemes.description: Offers subsidies on the purchase of various agricultural machinery like Power Tillers, Disc Ploughs, Cultivators, and Reapers to enhance farm mechanization and productivity.
schemes.benefits: Financial subsidy on the purchase price of approved agricultural equipment, benefiting approximately 50,000 farmers.
required_docs: Quotation for the equipment from an authorized dealer

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a farmer in Rajasthan. Subsidy amount varies based on the type of equipment and farmer category (e.g., small, marginal).

schemes.application_mode: Online portal and through local agricultural department offices

schemes.name: National Horticulture Mission (NHM) - Rajasthan
schemes.target_audience: Farmers interested in horticulture and fruit cultivation
schemes.description: A centrally sponsored scheme aimed at promoting horticulture by providing subsidies to farmers for establishing new fruit orchards.
schemes.benefits: Subsidy for the establishment of new fruit orchards, covering costs for planting material and initial setup to expand the area under fruit cultivation.

eligibility_rules.description: Farmers in Rajasthan with suitable land for horticulture can apply. The scheme aims to benefit 4,000 farmers in the 2026-27 period.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the horticulture department portal

schemes.name: Subsidy for Farm Fencing (Tarbandi)
schemes.target_audience: Farmers facing crop damage from stray or wild animals
schemes.description: Provides financial assistance to farmers for fencing their fields (Tarbandi) to protect crops from damage caused by animals.
schemes.benefits: Subsidy on the cost of fencing materials and installation for a specified length, aiming to benefit 1,250 farmers.

eligibility_rules.description: Available to farmers in Rajasthan to protect their crops. Priority may be given to small and marginal farmers.

schemes.application_mode: Online portal of the agriculture department

schemes.name: Agri Stack PMU for Farmers
schemes.target_audience: All farmers in Rajasthan seeking modern agricultural advice
schemes.description: A technology-driven initiative (Project Management Unit) to provide farmers with data-driven consultancy services, support for precision input management, crop planning assistance, and market intelligence.
schemes.benefits: Access to free, data-driven advisory services for better crop planning, resource management, risk reduction, and market access through digital platforms.

eligibility_rules.description: Any farmer registered in Rajasthan can access the services provided by the Agri Stack PMU.

schemes.application_mode: Digital platforms and mobile applications

schemes.name: Subsidy for Vertical Farming Support Systems
schemes.target_audience: Farmers interested in modern, high-yield farming techniques
schemes.description: A scheme to encourage the adoption of vertical farming by providing subsidies for setting up vertical support systems, aimed at increasing crop yield in smaller land areas.
schemes.benefits: Financial subsidy for the infrastructure and setup of vertical farming systems, with a target to benefit 5,000 farmers.
required_docs: Project proposal for the vertical farm

eligibility_rules.description: Available to farmers in Rajasthan willing to adopt and invest in vertical farming technology.

schemes.application_mode: Online through the state's agriculture or horticulture department portal

schemes.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Udyam Protsahan Yojana (IMSUPY)
schemes.target_audience: Women entrepreneurs and Self-Help Groups (SHGs)
schemes.description: A scheme by the Government of Rajasthan to promote women's entrepreneurship by providing financial assistance and support for setting up and expanding businesses.
schemes.benefits: Provides financial assistance in the form of loans and subsidies to individual women entrepreneurs and women's self-help groups.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicant must be a woman resident of Rajasthan, above 18 years of age, starting or running an enterprise.

schemes.application_mode: Online via the official government portal or through designated financial institutions.

schemes.name: Chiranjeevi Durghatna Bima Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Families registered under the Chiranjeevi Health Insurance Scheme
schemes.description: Provides accidental insurance protection to families registered under the state's health insurance scheme, offering a social safety net in case of accidents.
schemes.benefits: Financial compensation in the event of accidental death or permanent disability of a family member.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a family registered under the Mukhyamantri Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana in Rajasthan.

schemes.application_mode: Automatic enrollment for eligible families; claims are filed through the designated portal or office.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi Matritva Poshan Yojana
schemes.target_audience: Pregnant and lactating mothers
schemes.description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to pregnant women for their second child, aiming to improve the nutritional status of both mother and child.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of Rs. 6,000 provided in installments during pregnancy and after childbirth for the second child.

eligibility_rules.description: Applicable for pregnant women for their second live birth in designated districts of Rajasthan.

schemes.application_mode: Registration through local Anganwadi centers and health facilities.

schemes.name: HPV Vaccination Drive for Girls
schemes.target_audience: Teenage girls (9-14 years)
schemes.description: A nationwide campaign, launched in Rajasthan, to provide the Human Papillomavirus (HPV) vaccine to teenage girls to protect against cervical cancer.
schemes.benefits: Free administration of the HPV vaccine, which provides protection against HPV types responsible for most cervical cancers.

eligibility_rules.description: Targeted at girls in the age group of 9 to 14 years.

schemes.application_mode: Administered through schools and government health centers.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
schemes.target_audience: Pregnant Women and Lactating Mothers
schemes.description: A maternity benefit program by the Government of India providing partial wage compensation to women for wage-loss during childbirth and to ensure safe delivery and good nutrition.
schemes.benefits: Cash incentive of Rs. 5,000 in installments for the first live birth.
required_docs: Aadhaar Card of beneficiary and husband
Bank or Post Office Account Passbook
MCP Card (Mother and Child Protection Card)

eligibility_rules.description: For pregnant and lactating mothers for their first live birth. Excludes women in regular employment with Central/State Government or PSUs.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration or through Anganwadi Centre (AWC) / ASHA / ANM.

schemes.name: Mission Shakti
schemes.target_audience: Women and girls
schemes.description: An integrated women empowerment program by the Government of India focusing on safety, security, and empowerment through its sub-schemes 'Sambal' (for safety) and 'Samarthya' (for empowerment).
schemes.benefits: Provides access to services like One Stop Centres, Women Helplines, Beti Bachao Beti Padhao, and empowerment initiatives like PMMVY.
required_docs: Other documents as per specific sub-scheme

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility criteria vary depending on the specific component or sub-scheme being accessed.

schemes.application_mode: Through various channels depending on the sub-scheme, including government offices, helplines, and online portals.

schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana (for Women Entrepreneurs)
schemes.target_audience: Women entrepreneurs seeking small business loans
schemes.description: A scheme to provide collateral-free loans up to Rs. 10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises, with a significant percentage of loans sanctioned to women.
schemes.benefits: Collateral-free loans under three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001 to ₹5 lakh), and Tarun (₹5,00,001 to ₹10 lakh).

eligibility_rules.description: Any Indian citizen, particularly women, with a viable business plan for a non-farm sector income-generating activity.

schemes.application_mode: Through Banks, Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs), and Micro Finance Institutions (MFIs).

schemes.name: Chief Minister’s Youth Self-Employment Scheme
schemes.target_audience: Aspiring young entrepreneurs in Rajasthan
schemes.description: A scheme to encourage youth to transition from job seekers to job creators by providing financial assistance for setting up their own ventures.
schemes.benefits: Provides 100% interest subsidy and margin money grants on loans up to Rs 10 lakh to one lakh youth.

eligibility_rules.description: Youth residing in Rajasthan aiming to start a new business. The initial phase targets 30,000 beneficiaries.

schemes.application_mode: Through designated government portals and financial institutions.

schemes.name: AI and Deep-Tech Techno Hubs Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Youth, students, and startups in the technology sector
schemes.description: Establishment of AI and deep-tech-enabled Techno Hubs in three major cities to foster innovation and provide access to advanced technology and skills.
schemes.benefits: Access to cutting-edge technology infrastructure, mentorship, and a collaborative ecosystem for developing tech-based solutions and startups.

eligibility_rules.description: Open to students, researchers, and entrepreneurs with an interest in AI and deep technologies.

schemes.application_mode: Through the official portal of the Techno Hubs.

schemes.name: Foreign Language and Advanced Skill Training Programme
schemes.target_audience: Youth seeking global employment opportunities
schemes.description: A program to enhance the global employability of youth by providing training in high-demand foreign languages and other advanced skills.
schemes.benefits: Subsidized training for 1,000 youth in languages such as English, French, Japanese, German, and Korean, targeting sectors like hospitality, IT, and healthcare.

eligibility_rules.description: Youth of Rajasthan who have completed a minimum level of education and are seeking to work in global markets.

schemes.application_mode: Online application through the state's skill development portal.

schemes.name: Recognition of Prior Learning (RPL) Programme for Unorganised Sector
schemes.target_audience: Workers in the unorganised sector
schemes.description: A scheme to formally recognize and certify the skills of workers in the unorganised sector, enhancing their credibility and employment opportunities.
schemes.benefits: Provides formal assessment and certification of existing skills for 20,000 workers, improving their employability and potential for higher wages.

eligibility_rules.description: Individuals working in the unorganised sector in Rajasthan with existing skills but no formal certification.

schemes.application_mode: Through designated assessment centers and mobile camps.

schemes.name: Atal Gyan Kendras
schemes.target_audience: Rural youth in Rajasthan
schemes.description: Establishment of knowledge and training centers at the village panchayat level to expand skill development and training opportunities in rural areas.
schemes.benefits: Provides local access to various skill training programs, digital literacy, and information on employment opportunities, bridging the urban-rural skill gap.
required_docs: Proof of Residence in the respective Panchayat

eligibility_rules.description: Youth residing in rural areas of Rajasthan.

schemes.application_mode: On-site registration at the local Atal Gyan Kendra.

schemes.name: Vocational Education Expansion Program in Schools
schemes.target_audience: School students in Rajasthan
schemes.description: An initiative to integrate vocational education and skill-based learning into the regular school curriculum to enhance employability from an early age.
schemes.benefits: Students gain practical, job-oriented skills alongside their academic education, making them better prepared for the workforce upon graduation.

eligibility_rules.description: Students enrolled in participating government schools in Rajasthan.

schemes.application_mode: Integrated into the school curriculum; no separate application required by students.

schemes.name: Rajasthan Government Jobs Initiative
schemes.target_audience: Youth seeking employment in the public sector
schemes.description: A state-level initiative with a target to create four lakh government jobs over five years, with transparent recruitment managed by the Rajasthan State Testing Agency (RSTA).
schemes.benefits: Opportunity to secure stable employment in various government departments and agencies.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility criteria as per the specific job notifications released by various government departments.

schemes.application_mode: Online application through the respective recruitment portals for specific job openings.

schemes.name: Rajasthan Homestay Scheme 2026
schemes.target_audience: Urban and rural homeowners in Rajasthan
schemes.description: A scheme to strengthen local tourism by encouraging homeowners to offer their properties as homestays, creating income opportunities and promoting cultural exchange.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance or capital subsidy for setting up or upgrading rooms, promotional support from the state tourism department, and access to skill development or hospitality training programmes.
required_docs: Proof of permanent residency in Rajasthan

eligibility_rules.description: Applicants must be permanent residents of Rajasthan. The property must be located within the state and legally owned or leased by the applicant. The property must meet basic safety and hygiene standards.

schemes.application_mode: Online registration through the official tourism portal.

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Urban (SBM-U)
schemes.target_audience: Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) and urban residents
schemes.description: A national mission implemented in Rajasthan to make urban areas free from open defecation and to achieve 100% scientific management of municipal solid waste.
schemes.benefits: Provides grants and support to Urban Local Bodies for improving sanitation, solid waste management, and overall cleanliness in cities.
required_docs: Project proposals from Urban Local Bodies

eligibility_rules.description: The scheme targets Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) across the state to improve sanitation infrastructure and services.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented through state government and Urban Local Bodies.

schemes.name: Rajasthan Urban Infrastructure Development Project (RUIDP)
schemes.target_audience: Residents of major urban areas in Rajasthan
schemes.description: A large-scale urban development program, supported by the Asian Development Bank (ADB), focusing on improving key urban infrastructure and services like water supply, sewerage, drainage, and roads.
schemes.benefits: Improved water supply, wastewater management, solid waste management, roads and bridges, restored cultural heritage, and upgraded slums.
required_docs: Not applicable for individual beneficiaries as it is an infrastructure project.

eligibility_rules.description: The project targets specific urban areas in Rajasthan for comprehensive infrastructure upgrades.

schemes.application_mode: Implemented by the Government of Rajasthan with ADB support.

schemes.name: Nonera Major Drinking Water Project
schemes.target_audience: Residents in the project's service areas
schemes.description: A project focused on strengthening the state's drinking water supply system by providing clean and safe drinking water through new infrastructure.
schemes.benefits: Improved access to clean and safe drinking water for households and communities.

eligibility_rules.description: Residents of the project's designated service areas will benefit from the improved water supply.

schemes.application_mode: Government infrastructure project.

schemes.name: Parwan Akawad Major Drinking Water Project
schemes.target_audience: Residents in the project's service areas
schemes.description: A major project aimed at launching five packages to significantly strengthen the drinking water supply system in Rajasthan.
schemes.benefits: Enhanced and more reliable drinking water supply for residents in the project areas.

eligibility_rules.description: The project benefits residents within its service jurisdiction by improving water infrastructure.

schemes.application_mode: Government infrastructure project.

schemes.name: Wastewater Management System Development Grants
schemes.target_audience: Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) in cities with a population between 10 to 40 lakh
schemes.description: Specific grants for the development of wastewater management systems in selected cities to improve sanitation and water management.
schemes.benefits: Financial grants for infrastructure development, including separation of stormwater and drainage systems, expansion of wastewater systems, and reduction of non-revenue water.
required_docs: Project proposals from eligible Urban Local Bodies

eligibility_rules.description: Grants are available to selected Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) in cities with a population between 10 to 40 lakh.

schemes.application_mode: Application by eligible Urban Local Bodies to the state/central government.

schemes.name: Power Infrastructure Strengthening Scheme
schemes.target_audience: General public and industries in Rajasthan
schemes.description: A scheme to ensure efficient electricity transmission from renewable energy sources and strengthen the overall power infrastructure by establishing new 220 kV and 400 kV grid substations.
schemes.benefits: Improved and reliable electricity supply and efficient transmission from renewable sources.

eligibility_rules.description: This is a state-wide infrastructure project benefiting all electricity consumers.

schemes.application_mode: Government infrastructure project.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized sector workers such as domestic workers, street vendors, mid-day meal workers, construction workers, agricultural labourers, and others.
schemes.description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme designed to provide old age protection and social security for unorganized workers.
schemes.benefits: Provides an assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after the beneficiary attains the age of 60 years.
required_docs: Savings bank account or Jan-Dhan account passbook

eligibility_rules.description: The applicant must be an unorganized worker, not covered under EPFO, ESIC, or NPS (government funded).

schemes.application_mode: Enrollment can be done through Common Service Centres (CSCs) or via the official online portal.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized workers and any individual with a participating bank account.
schemes.description: A government-backed life insurance scheme offering renewable one-year term life cover.
schemes.benefits: Provides a life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh in case of the insured person's death for any reason.

eligibility_rules.description: Available to individuals aged between 18 and 50 years who have a bank account and give their consent to join/enable auto-debit. The annual premium is ₹436.

schemes.application_mode: Through participating banks and post offices.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized workers and any individual with a participating bank account.
schemes.description: A government-backed accident insurance scheme offering coverage for accidental death and disability.
schemes.benefits: Provides an insurance cover of ₹2 lakh for accidental death or total permanent disability, and ₹1 lakh for permanent partial disability.

eligibility_rules.description: Available to individuals aged between 18 and 70 years with a bank account.

schemes.application_mode: Through participating banks and post offices.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.target_audience: All citizens of India, with a special focus on workers in the unorganized sector.
schemes.description: A pension scheme that provides a guaranteed minimum monthly pension to subscribers after the age of 60.
schemes.benefits: Offers a guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000, ₹2,000, ₹3,000, ₹4,000, or ₹5,000 per month after retirement, based on the contribution level.

eligibility_rules.description: Any Indian citizen between 18 and 40 years of age with a savings bank account is eligible to join.

schemes.application_mode: Through the bank or post office where the individual holds a savings account.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
schemes.target_audience: Unorganized workers registered on the e-Shram portal and other vulnerable families identified through SECC data.
schemes.description: A national public health insurance scheme aimed at providing free access to healthcare for low-income earners in the country.
schemes.benefits: Provides a health insurance cover of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization at empanelled hospitals.

eligibility_rules.description: Eligibility is determined based on the Socio-Economic Caste Census (SECC) 2011 data and for unorganized workers registered on the e-Shram portal.

schemes.application_mode: Eligible beneficiaries can get their Ayushman card from empanelled hospitals or Common Service Centres (CSCs).

schemes.name: National Pension System (NPS)
